news.Title: 依然靠AI 大摩擁抱封測雙雄
news.Content:
封測雙雄30日頂著台股回檔逆風，開低走高表現相對強勢。摩根士丹利證券指出，日月光投控（3711）高階先進封裝（LEAP）業務在強勁封裝需求帶動下，今年相關營收將優於公司預期，京元電（2449）則受惠聯發科TPU專案進展順利，最終測試（FT）時間可能高於原先預期，分別將雙雄股價預期升至408元與358元。

國際資金在大摩觀點帶動下，單日買超京元電2,283張，儘管對日月光投控站在調節方，但賣超張數也僅300張。就股價表現來看，日月光投控終場收平盤，相比台股強勢許多。

摩根士丹利證券半導體產業分析師詹家鴻指出，日月光投控經營管理階層先前於法說會中預估，2026年LEAP（AI）營收至少可達32億美元，較2025年的16億美元倍增；不過，根據大摩基本面分析，在先進封裝（oS）委外需求與CPU CoWoS需求同步升溫帶動下，日月光投控今年LEAP營收有機會達到35億美元。

摩根士丹利認為，日月光投控目前仍是輝達GPU主要oS供應商，根據供應鏈調查，Google TPU、超微（AMD）MI400系列大部分訂單，也可能因台積電無塵室產能限制，而從台積電轉單至日月光投控。此外，AMD Venice CPU可望在 日月光投控採用完整類CoWoS封裝方案，意味日月光投控相關業務表現可望優於財測。

京元電方面，近期市場關注聯發科TPU是否因設計調整而延後，根據大摩供應鏈調查顯示，由於功耗略高於預期，目前晶片確實正針對部分金屬層進行工程變更（ECO）。不過，摩根士丹利指出，此次調整無需重新投片（re-spin），且Google已同步進行測試與驗證，因此，整體量產時程仍可望如期落在第四季。大摩並預估，聯發科TPU的最終測試時間將自500～600秒起跳（並搭配約四小時的burn-in測試），高於原先預期的450秒。

高盛證券日前才升評京元電至「買進」，看好其毛利率結構性上升已成新常態，拜先進晶片測試需求強勁所賜，帶動獲利改善速度加快。高盛預估，京元電2026～2027年平均毛利率將大幅提升至40.7％，遠優於過去三年平均的34.8％。

高盛研判，京元電營收成長可望延續至2027年，主要來自三大驅動力：首先，來自AI GPU、AI ASIC與AI網通需求優於預期；其次，測試複雜度持續提升，帶動測試時間拉長與新測試流程導入，如：系統級測試（SLT）與burn-in；再者，先進製程與AI相關應用營收占比提高，有助支撐毛利率表現。

news.Title: 重量級外資調升台積電目標價 台股現生機
news.Content:
花旗環球證券指出，強勁的AI需求已不再侷限於GPU、ASIC領域，並已擴散至更廣泛生態系，看好台積電（2330）憑藉強大定價能力，AI相關營收明年將繳出年增100％以上成績單，將推測合理股價升至2,800元，是給出最高價的重量級外資，也讓台股與台積電在季線保衛戰覓得生機。

花旗環球調升台積電股價預期至2,800元後，是重量級外資券商中最高，里昂證券的3,030元則是市場上唯一飛越3字頭者，加上高盛的2,600元，以及先前大摩上調後的2,288元、凱基投顧的2,420元，於台積電4月16日法說會到來前，多頭派共識區間已開始悄悄上移。

台積電近期股價只要出現較明顯回檔，基本上均不乏內外資研究機構跳出來捍衛，3月上旬下挫至1,800元附近時，摩根士丹利證券、凱基投顧雙雙護航，並上調股價預期。摩根士丹利證券半導體產業分析師詹家鴻當時便將台積電2027、2028年資本支出，調升至650與750億美元，並看好資本支出轉化為營收的效率進一步提升。

花旗環球證券台灣區研究部主管陳佳儀原預期台積電至2030年營收可達3,000億美元，隨AI加速驅動產能擴張周期，最新進一步上調整體展望，強調在GPU／加速器、網通晶片與伺服器CPU等AI需求全面擴張帶動下，台積電不只成長動能強勁，訂單能見度亦明顯延長。

在資本支出方面，花旗環球原預估台積電2027年資本支出約600億美元，現上調至670億美元，並進一步預期2028年將達750億美元以上。台積電發揮跨製程技術優勢，3與2奈米製程產能2027年將分別年增30％～40％與100％以上，2奈米製程、A16於2028年還會進一步翻倍。花旗環球證券認為，在AI與先進製程營收占比持續提升下，台積電資本密集度將維持約30％穩定水準，並預估2027、2028年營收將分別年增36％與25％。

值得一提的是，花旗環球證券說明，台積電對AI營收貢獻的定義目前僅涵蓋GPU、AI加速器與基底晶片，並預期2024～2029年相關營收年複合成長率近60％。但若進一步納入AI基礎建設持續擴建，以及包含CPO之網通晶片在scale-up與scale-out架構下的擴張機會，加上AI生態系CPU市場規模擴大，整體AI相關成長動能將更為強勁，明年甚至有機會拿出倍增表現。

news.Title: 【公告】晶豪科國內第一次無擔保可轉換公司債行使債券贖回權，申請轉換為普通股最後期限為115年04月10日，為確保本債券持有人權益，特此通告。
news.Content:
日 期：2026年03月30日

公司名稱：晶豪科 (3006)

主 旨：晶豪科國內第一次無擔保可轉換公司債行使債券贖回權，申請轉換為普通股最後期限為115年04月10日，為確保本債券持有人權益，特此通告。

發言人：吳鴻基

說 明：

1.事實發生日:115/03/30

2.公司名稱:晶豪科技股份有限公司

3.與公司關係(請輸入本公司或子公司):本公司

4.相互持股比例:不適用

5.發生緣由:本公司國內第一次無擔保轉換公司債(簡稱：晶豪科一，代碼：30061)

行使債券贖回權暨訂於115年04月09日終止櫃檯買賣等相關事宜。

6.因應措施:

(1)債券持有人若未於115年04月10日前至往來券商辦理將本轉換公司債轉換為

普通股，本公司將依收回基準日115年04月08日之債權人名冊，依債券面額

(即每張台幣壹拾萬元)現金收回未轉換之晶豪科一，以匯款或開具支票方式

給付予各債權人，銀行匯費及支票掛號郵資將由支付總金額中扣除。

news.Title: 《熱門族群》美光止跌穩定台系記憶體 處置股1檔亮燈
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】美光上周五止跌收漲0.5%。台系記憶體製造廠南亞科(2408)同步抗跌，被列處置股且短期跌深的下游模組廠更逆勢上攻，廣穎(4973)早盤一度亮燈漲停。

廣穎公布自結115年2月每股盈餘達1.72元。激勵今早股價漲停67.3元，盤中漲停打開，目前65元。

目前有旺宏、威剛等八檔記憶體股被列處置股，但今早股價大多止跌甚至大漲，包括旺宏一度翻紅，宜鼎一度強攻。

美光上周五逆勢抗跌，拉抬台系記憶體廠南亞科(2408)開高一度上攻，華邦電(2344)走揚站穩90元關卡，另一上游製造廠力積電(6770)一度回攻60元關卡。此三檔早盤成交量居於前十。

南亞科今早盤最高227元，反攻私募定價。

南亞科上周宣布完成大規模私募普通股案，引進Sandisk等四家國際大廠入股，合計私募逾35萬張普通股，以每股定價223.9元計算，總募資金達新台幣787.18億元。

目前被列處置的上游製造廠旺宏，以及下游模組廠廣穎等，今早股價均不再重挫，呈現震盪整理。威剛將於本周三率先「出關」。

今年記憶體嚴重供不應求，股價再拉一波強勁之漲勢，因短期飆漲，目前八檔被列處置股。包括威剛、旺宏、鈺創、廣穎、宇瞻、宜鼎、晶豪科、創見。

威剛(3260)處置期間至4月1日。

鈺創(5351)處置期間3月19日~4月1日。

廣穎電通(4973)27日收61.20元，近5日跌30.77%，處置期間3月20日至4月2日。

旺宏(2337)處置期間至4月8日。

創見(2451)處置期間3月23日至4月7日。

晶豪科(3006)處置期間3月20日至4月2日。

宇瞻(8271)處置期間至4月2日。

宜鼎(5289)近5日跌20.33%，處置期間3月20日至4月2日。（編輯：沈培華）

news.Title: 《產業》法人看好超級周期延續 記憶體跌深反彈可期
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】Google發表TurboQuant新壓縮技術，引發市場對記憶體需求前景疑慮，衝擊股價明顯拉回，但護航聲浪此時也正加速凝聚。野村證券預料，記憶體多頭循環將走得比油價上漲更久，金控旗下投顧研究機構看好代理式AI將支撐記憶體超級周期延續，各指標股跌深反彈機會浮現。

受到中東地緣衝突、外資降評、Google發表TurboQuant等消息接連影響，記憶體族群股價近期表現不振，且不只台系的南亞科、華邦電、旺宏等走弱，全球龍頭大廠美光也極為弱勢，族群投資氣氛與數月前相去甚遠。

不過，不少內外資研究機構依舊看好記憶體前景，同時根據最新市況，提出正向觀點。南亞科最近宣布私募引入四位認購人：Sandisk、鎧俠、Solidigm、Cisco等四「大咖」業者入股後，預期皆會成為南亞科前十大股東。

對此，大和資本證券指出，透過此次多年期DRAM供應協議，南亞科可望確保長期且穩定的需求，並取得更充裕現金資源，以支應後續投資布局。

儘管摩根士丹利對南亞科持中性看法，認為DRAM價格年增動能將於下半年開始放緩，但也認同南亞科短期獲利表現將續強，推測合理股價仍高達298元；此外，針對南亞科私募引入四大業者，大摩預期股價將出現正向反應。摩根大通證券則將此次私募視為產業正向發展，有助於上下游建立更穩定的供應機制，無論對客戶或供應商而言，均有助確保DDR4長期採購來源。

金控旗下投顧研究機構則指出，美光經營管理階層於法說會指出，今年全球AI需求占記憶體與存儲比重將逾50％。其中，包含Google、微軟、Meta、亞馬遜在內的全球八大CSP預計今年合計資本支出將超過7,100億美元。

SemiAnalysis預估，上述資本支出中約30％用於記憶體採購，換算下來約創造記憶體產值2,130億美元，占記憶體總產值的39％，若再加上其他企業投資AI的支出，占比預估將逾50％。

法人指出，據市調機構估算，傳統DRAM第一季價格季增90％～95％，NAND季漲幅約55％～60％。由於DRAM價格漲幅已接近客戶端所能承受之臨界值，相較之下，NAND價格累積漲幅相對較小，因此後市將有較大的上漲空間。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一簡威瑟／台北報導)

news.Title: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Introduces Its Symantec CBX Platform
news.Content:
Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO ) is one of the High Growth Semiconductor Stocks to Buy . On March 23, Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) introduced its Symantec CBX, which is a new cloud-based cybersecurity platform. The platform merges technologies from Symantec and Carbon Black into one easy-to-use tool called Extended Detection and Response.

​Management elaborated that the target market for this platform is mid-sized resource-strapped organizations that face threats from hackers and don’t have the budget for fancy Security Operations Centers. The company also highlighted that cyberattacks are ramping up, and even smaller companies are not safe.

​The Symantec CBX platform provides prevention, adaptive protection, data security, a cloud secure web gateway for web filtering, and incident prediction. Moreover, Carbon Black helps with deep endpoint visibility, threat hunting, and fast response. Symantec CBX is expected to be available through the company’s Enterprise Security Group’s Catalyst Partner Program.

​Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) is a semiconductor and infrastructure software company. It designs and supplies products, including custom chips, networking solutions, and enterprise software used across industries such as cloud computing, telecommunications, and data centers.

While we acknowledge the potential of AVGO as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: 法人看好超級周期延續 記憶體跌深反彈可期
news.Content:
Google發表TurboQuant新壓縮技術，引發市場對記憶體需求前景疑慮，衝擊股價明顯拉回，但護航聲浪此時也正加速凝聚。野村證券預料，記憶體多頭循環將走得比油價上漲更久，金控旗下投顧研究機構看好代理式AI將支撐記憶體超級周期延續，各指標股跌深反彈機會浮現。

受到中東地緣衝突、外資降評、Google發表TurboQuant等消息接連影響，記憶體族群股價近期表現不振，且不只台系的南亞科、華邦電、旺宏等走弱，全球龍頭大廠美光也極為弱勢，族群投資氣氛與數月前相去甚遠。

不過，不少內外資研究機構依舊看好記憶體前景，同時根據最新市況，提出正向觀點。南亞科最近宣布私募引入四位認購人：Sandisk、鎧俠、Solidigm、Cisco等四「大咖」業者入股後，預期皆會成為南亞科前十大股東。

對此，大和資本證券指出，透過此次多年期DRAM供應協議，南亞科可望確保長期且穩定的需求，並取得更充裕現金資源，以支應後續投資布局。

儘管摩根士丹利對南亞科持中性看法，認為DRAM價格年增動能將於下半年開始放緩，但也認同南亞科短期獲利表現將續強，推測合理股價仍高達298元；此外，針對南亞科私募引入四大業者，大摩預期股價將出現正向反應。摩根大通證券則將此次私募視為產業正向發展，有助於上下游建立更穩定的供應機制，無論對客戶或供應商而言，均有助確保DDR4長期採購來源。

金控旗下投顧研究機構則指出，美光經營管理階層於法說會指出，今年全球AI需求占記憶體與存儲比重將逾50％。其中，包含Google、微軟、Meta、亞馬遜在內的全球八大CSP預計今年合計資本支出將超過7,100億美元。

SemiAnalysis預估，上述資本支出中約30％用於記憶體採購，換算下來約創造記憶體產值2,130億美元，占記憶體總產值的39％，若再加上其他企業投資AI的支出，占比預估將逾50％。

法人指出，據市調機構估算，傳統DRAM第一季價格季增90％～95％，NAND季漲幅約55％～60％。由於DRAM價格漲幅已接近客戶端所能承受之臨界值，相較之下，NAND價格累積漲幅相對較小，因此後市將有較大的上漲空間。

news.Title: 5 big analyst AI moves: Downgrades for SAP and Qualcomm; Arm lifted to Buy
news.Content:
Investing.com -- Here are the biggest analyst moves in the area of artificial intelligence (AI) for this week.

BofA reinstates Microsoft at Buy, calls it ’primary beneficiary of AI monetization’

Bank of America this week has reinstated coverage of Microsoft with a Buy rating and a $500 price target, describing the company as "a primary beneficiary of AI monetization" sitting "at the center of the AI supercycle."

In a note led by analyst Tal Liani, BofA argues Microsoft’s advantage "lies in its ability to capitalize on AI across both infrastructure and applications." Azure is seen as providing "the compute and data foundation for enterprise AI workloads," while software products including 365, Dynamics, GitHub and Windows "embed into everyday tasks that drive attach and consumption."

The $500 target — implying about 40% upside — is based on a 24x CY27 estimated price-to-earnings (P/E) multiple, a premium BofA views as justified by expected revenue growth of 15% to 17% annually over the next three years. Intelligent Cloud is forecast to grow 24% to 28% as AI workloads scale.

The broker also addresses key debates it says will shape Microsoft’s long-term trajectory, including the durability of its AI-related backlog, the implications of its OpenAI partnership, and whether the current AI cycle represents a bubble or a lasting shift.

On margins, BofA expects capital expenditure (capex) to rise sharply, from $44 billion in 2024 to roughly $143 billion by 2028, but expects Microsoft to sustain operating margins above 46%.

JPMorgan downgrades SAP to Neutral as cloud growth slows

JPMorgan has downgraded SAP to Neutral from Overweight, slashing its price target to €175 from €260, citing a weaker near-term outlook as cloud backlog growth decelerates and new strategic risks emerge.

The bank’s previously bullish stance rested on "accelerating revenue growth and significant margin expansion," but analysts said "the picture for performance has shifted" as multiple headwinds converge.

The core concern is SAP’s slowing current cloud backlog (CCB). Growth peaked in 2024 and has continued to moderate, with further deceleration expected into 2026 as the base of migrated customers matures.

"In a market that now demands acceleration to counter prevailing software bear arguments, deceleration is unlikely to support near-term stock performance," analysts led by Toby Ogg wrote.

The team also flagged a potential move toward a consumption or outcome-based business model. While seen as necessary, the shift could introduce revenue volatility and "skew the traditional links between metrics that investors are currently wired up for," complicating forecasting.

Story Continues

Intensifying competition in the AI agent layer adds further pressure, with large language model providers scaling rapidly and peers increasing spend. JPMorgan warned this could weigh on margins and fuel M&A activity.

"In aggregate, change is fast approaching and incumbents, including SAP, will need to invest and evolve to give themselves the best chance of remaining relevant as the AI cycle unfolds," the analysts said.

Bernstein cuts Qualcomm on memory costs, weak smartphone demand

Bernstein has downgraded Qualcomm to Market Perform from Outperform, lowering its price target to $140 from $175 amid rising memory costs and weakening smartphone demand.

Analyst Stacy Rasgon warned that surging mobile DRAM and NAND prices are becoming a significant drag, with the potential for "double-digit unit declines this year" in smartphone shipments as vendors face pressure to raise prices, cut specs, or absorb margin hits.

Rasgon also argued that consensus estimates remain too high. Despite Qualcomm having already guided lower, he said "numbers (which we already thought looked elevated) now appear much too high," with further downside risk from weaker volumes and an anticipated step-down in Apple-related revenues toward year-end.

The Apple modem transition is a central concern. Rasgon flagged that Apple’s share of Qualcomm’s modem business could fall from around 80% to roughly 20%, a headwind he believes the market still underestimates.

Additionally, Apple-related licensing contributes approximately $1.50 of EPS, with the current agreement expiring in April 2027. While he expects Qualcomm to ultimately prevail in any dispute, he cautioned the process could be volatile and weigh on sentiment.

Potential offsets — including a $20 billion buyback and a possible datacenter event — are seen as insufficient to shift sentiment. "We feel a bit bad for the company; they appear to be doing everything right, but are living in a bad neighborhood at the moment," Rasgon wrote.

"We suspect things get worse before they get better, and while the stock remains extremely cheap even on our numbers, that becomes less of a support when one can buy actual AI winners for under 15x on ’realistic’ estimates," he added. "If the neighborhood shows signs of gentrification we will be happy to revisit it."

Needham lifts Arm Holdings to Buy, says co’s ’bold moves’ are paying off

This week, Needham & Company upgraded Arm Holdings to Buy with a $200 price target, arguing that a series of high-stakes strategic bets are paying off as demand for AI-focused CPUs accelerates.

Having stayed on the sidelines for two and a half years, the firm said it now sees a turning point. "We have been on the sidelines on ARM for 2.5 years and now see a series of their high-stake bets … are working," analysts wrote.

"These bold moves should disrupt the existing industry landscape (one of the reasons why we were cautious) but are transforming ARM for the better now in a surprising way," they added.

Needham pointed to Arm’s push into higher royalty rates, compute subsystems, and its own silicon as key drivers of the shift. The analysts argued that "ARM has become a credible AI play, right around the time when the company has better structured itself to capture greater value from AI," citing the rise of agentic AI and growing CPU workloads in data centers.

Central to the upgrade is Arm’s AGI CPU — its first Arm-designed data center processor, developed with Meta and targeting agentic AI workloads. Analysts said the move "perfectly epitomizes" Mark Zuckerberg’s mantra to "move fast and break things," adding that Arm’s entrance into silicon via Meta once looked risky but is now showing clear momentum.

BofA raises Dell and Sandisk targets on ’very robust’ AI server demand

In a separate note, Bank of America has lifted price targets for Dell and Sandisk following an Asia supply-chain review that pointed to strong AI server demand and a tightening NAND market.

Analyst Wamsi Mohan said checks indicate "demand for AI servers remains strong," with near-term revenue driven primarily by GB300-based systems and further VR-rack shipments expected in the second half.

On Dell, the bank came away "favorably," saying its $50 billion fiscal 2027 AI-server revenue guide "could end up conservative." BofA now forecasts $15 billion of AI-server revenue for the first quarter, up from $13 billion, and has raised its full-year estimate to $60 billion from $50 billion.

Dell’s price target was lifted to $172 from $155.

For Sandisk, BofA cited a "strong NAND outlook" and tightening supply, noting that pricing "continues to be strong" and that customers are increasingly seeking long-term agreements. The analysts model a 63% quarter-over-quarter average selling price (ASP) jump for the March quarter and raised their June-quarter forecast to 20% growth.

Sandisk’s price target was increased to $900 from $850.

On the broader picture, BofA flagged persistent tightness in global optical fiber supply, while PC demand remains mixed. The bank warned that pull-forward buying tied to rising memory prices could leave the second half "weaker," with potential "incremental downside" to industry PC demand.

Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD ) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years . On March 24, Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon signalled caution to investors in Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD). He suggests investors should wait and see whether demand for AMD chips comes from people genuinely looking for AMD products rather than from those buying just because supply is constrained elsewhere.

The analyst had expressed similar sentiment on March 5 when he assigned a Hold rating to the stock with a price target of $235. news.Title: Broadcom (AVGO) Bags Another US Government Defense Deal
news.Content:
Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO ) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years . On March 24, Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) and Carahsoft Technology Corp. announced that they had secured a five-year, $970M blanket purchase agreement from the Defense Information Systems Agency. The deal marks an expansion of AVGO’s role in U.S. defense technology. The agreement is designed to streamline and consolidate software contracts across multiple Department of Defense agencies, including the Space Force and Air Force. It also introduces standardized pricing and improved cost transparency for private cloud infrastructure, security solutions, and other Broadcom offerings. This is expected to simplify how agencies purchase and deploy technology.

Regan McGrath, President, Americas, Broadcom, expressed his views on the partnership:

Broadcom is proud to partner with Carahsoft on this vital modernization initiative for the DoW. By consolidating licensing, simplifying procurement and delivering a modern private cloud, we are helping the agency and the agencies it serves to accelerate secure digital transformation at scale. This agreement ensures mission-ready performance, consistent governance and a foundation capable of supporting the next generation of AI-enabled defense capabilities.

At the core of the agreement is VMware Cloud Foundation. It allows agencies to run both legacy and cloud-based applications on a single platform, with support for AI and Kubernetes. The deal also includes additional services and tools aimed at improving efficiency and reducing risks. It may also help reduce costs and speed up deployment timelines.

Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) operates as a developer, designer, and supplier of a range of semiconductor devices and infrastructure software solutions globally. It operates through the Infrastructure Software and Semiconductor Solutions segments. The company was incorporated in 1961 and is based in Palo Alto, California.

news.Title: Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) Going Strong Amid Tight Capacity Conditions
news.Content:
Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM ) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years . Reuters reported on March 24 that, as per an executive at Broadcom, the company’s manufacturing partner, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE:TSM), is operating near full capacity as demand for AI chips continues to surge. The executive added that the broader industry is also facing supply chain constraints. He pointed out shortages in areas such as printed circuit boards and lasers, which have emerged as unexpected bottlenecks and are causing delays. To address these constraints, many customers are signing long-term agreements for 3-4 years. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE:TSM) has also said its customer planning timelines are now 2-3 years in advance due to tight capacity conditions.

Director of product marketing in Broadcom’s Physical Layer Products division, Natarajan Ramachandran, commented:

"We are seeing that TSMC is hitting (production capacity) limits. They will be ​increasing the capacity to 2027, but that has become a bottleneck, ⁠or that has kind of choked the supply chain in 2026."

According to the CEO C.C. Wei, the company is working hard to expand the capacity in Arizona and Taiwan to meet demand. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE:TSM), which produces around 90% of the world’s most advanced chips, counts Nvidia and Apple among its key customers. Meanwhile, Samsung is also shifting towards three- to five-year long-term contracts to better manage industry cycles.

news.Title: 《熱門族群》24檔除息股 僅半數邁向填息
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】除息旺季到，27日就有24檔除息股同場較勁，然受到台股走勢不佳影響，僅12檔成功邁向填息路，且填息狀況很慘澹，普遍填息率未及1成，僅剩高力和秀育異軍突起，實現一日填息的美夢，至於因卡位AI及記憶體備受市場關注的仁寶、華邦電更慘遭滑鐵盧，陷入貼息的窘境。

上市櫃公司去年獲利優，連帶股息派發也很大方，派息率有拉高傾向，其中更不乏超額配息股，據統計，27日除息的24檔個股有生合、宜進、仁寶、華邦電、精元、百容、卓越、米斯特、台灣精銳、東科-KY、禾聯碩、鋼聯、全宇昕、東捷資訊、叡揚、愛派司、汎瑋材料、聚賢研發-創、威力德生醫、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀育等。

其中，股息逾5元的高股息股包括台灣精銳、東科-KY、鋼聯、愛派司等4檔，分別以10元、近7.21元、5.3元、5元股息，拿下27日除息金額前四名，惟市場對高股息股似乎不太捧場，4檔填息率均未達1成，現金股利最多的台灣精銳，甚至還貼息。

成功踏上填息路的還有生合、百容、全宇昕、汎瑋、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀育，其中完成一日填息僅高力和秀育。至於市場關注的仁寶、華邦電就沒那麼幸運，因台股近期盤勢不佳，再加上記憶體需求傳雜音，填息路不平，雙雙陷入貼息窘境。

台股3月填息秀屢屢受阻，法人指出，與中東戰事不明，台股再陷整理行情。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一鄭淑芳／台北報導)

news.Title: 南亞科私募引進國際四大巨頭資金、國泰金法說、電價凍漲 本周大事回顧
news.Content:
南亞科周三 (25 日) 宣布，Kioxia、Sandisk、SK 海力士旗下 Solidigm、Cisco 四家將認購私募普通股共 351,578 仟股，共募資 787.18 億元；國泰金周五 (27 日) 召開法說會，2025 年股海實現資本利得為 1148 億元；經濟部周五召開電價審議會，決議此次電價凍漲，以下為本周大事回顧：

南亞科私募引進 SK 海力士、鎧俠等四大咖 共募資 787 億元

DRAM 大廠南亞科 ( 2408-TW ) 周三 (25 日) 宣布，Kioxia、Sandisk、SK 海力士旗下 Solidigm、Cisco 四家將認購私募普通股共 351,578 仟股，以每股定價 223.9 元推算，此次一共募資 787.18 億元，業界看好，此次隨著全球 DRAM、NAND 大廠與系統廠同步認購私募案，股東陣容相當豪華，可望進一步提升南亞科與全球記憶體廠乃至系統端的合作。

〈國泰金法說〉國壽 2025 股海賺 1148 億元 2 月底未實現利益衝破 1400 億元

國泰金控 ( 2882-TW ) 周五 (27 日) 舉行 2025 第四季法說會，由總經理李長庚親自主持，市場關注子公司國泰人壽投資獲利情形，根據財報顯示，去年於股海實現資本利得 1148 億元，持平前年，當中台股投報率上升至 16%，國壽總經理林昭廷透露，截至今年 2 月底，國內外股票未實現利益已衝破 1400 億元，相較於 1 月 1 日基準，整體部位在短短兩個月內回升近 1000 億元，可有效抵銷債券部位受高利率影響的評價壓力，並讓國壽淨值比維持在健康水位。

針對外界最關心的股利政策，管理層明確表態，目前金控端配發量能「十分充足」，目前帳上來看，至少配出去年現金股利 3.5 元水準沒問題。隨著國泰人壽接軌壓力減輕，國泰金總經理李長庚透露，將遵循董事長蔡宏圖「加速成長」的指示，重啟過去幾年放緩的併購步伐，轉向積極評估，會優先鎖定具備綜效的證券與投信標的，相對來說，海外機會較大。

電價凍漲！審議會：穩定物價優先 9 月底前維持每度 3.78 元 經部揭 3 大考量

經濟部於周五 (27 日) 召開 2026 年第 1 次電價費率審議會，會後記者會由經濟部次長賴建信親自主持。面對地緣政治劇烈動盪與國際能源價格波動，審議會最終達成共識，決議本次電價「不調整」，維持平均電價為每度 3.7823 元，適用期涵蓋 4 月至 9 月，以全力穩定民生物價為首要，並考量中東局勢及能源轉型，以確保產業競爭力。

戰事掀原物料漲價潮！上銀部分產品調漲 7-15% 訂單能見度 4 個月

「TMTS 2026 台灣國際工具機展」周三 (25 日) 於台中國際會展中心登場，上銀偕同集團的大銀、邁萃斯參展，董事長卓文恒受訪時透露，自去年底起訂單明顯回流，不僅過年期間產線罕見加班趕工，目前訂單能見度已達 4 個月。為因應美伊戰爭引發的油價與原物料漲勢，上銀本月起陸續調漲部分產品報價以反映成本，漲幅介於 7-15%，大銀也將有差異化調價的動作，但在 AI、半導體及自動化需求暢旺助力下，卓文恒對 2026 全年營運維持審慎樂觀態度，力拚營收、獲利優於去年。

news.Title: 《各報要聞》16檔長線利基股 蓄勢待發
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台股延續量縮震盪格局。法人指出，目前指數上沖下洗幅度開始收斂，量能同步放緩，且下周面臨4月清明連假僅4個交易日，建議籌碼浮額清洗階段將眼光放遠，關注去年獲利創高、今年前二月營收年增、股價修正至月線之下，三大法人單周逆勢買超股，包括群聯、光寶科等16檔，可望隨著盤面利空淡化，蓄勢待發。

群益投顧研究部副總裁曾炎裕表示，4月台股指數震盪格局機率大，即使過前高後續動能也有限，預料資金將流入強勢股或轉強股，矽光子、太空衛星題材及半導體設備先進封測等題材股，為盤面焦點。

野村投信國內股票投資部主管姚郁如指出，就台股評價面觀察，整體本益比（PE）高於均值、股價淨值比（PB）上行，但股東權益報酬率（ROE）自過去約10％出頭，提升至接近20％的水準，搭配獲利上修提供估值支撐。重點在於透過產業與公司層面的篩選，鎖定能將成本轉嫁、維持高毛利與高現金流的標的。

據統計，群聯、光寶科、鴻勁、精測、第一金等16檔個股，符合去年獲利創歷史新高，且今年前二月營收年增逾1成，基本面動能無虞，加上股價回到月線之下，三大法人逢低積極承接，預料在盤勢回穩之際，有望率先發動攻勢。

群聯去年稅後純益衝上87.39億元，創歷史新高，今年前二月營收年增178.23％。法人認為，公司正透過產品轉型來強化毛利表現，而不是只隨NAND Flash價格波動，最關鍵的是透過AI、企業級、車用、太空與軍工等高價值產品，創造更多、且價值更高的NAND應用方案。在NAND需求佳的情況下，預期群聯上半年毛利率將維持強勁。

美系券商表示，AI／HPC需求帶動成長持續，CPO機會浮現成為鴻勁潛在新成長引擎，預期今年營收成長4成，高階vision function訂單強勁。展望2026年，在AI晶片測試規格持續升級、系統級測試需求擴大，及高功耗散熱與溫控技術門檻拉高下，鴻勁營運仍可望延續成長態勢。

精測在高階探針卡、測試載板與半導體測試介面部分，受惠HPC、AI晶片與先進封裝需求升級，高頻高速測試規格持續拉升，高階測試鏈的技術門檻，題材、成長與評價三者仍具正向循環。(新聞來源 : 工商時報一陳昱光／台北報導)

news.Title: Bernstein Says Qualcomm Isn’t an AI Winner. Try Top-Rated Nvidia or Amazon Stock Instead.
news.Content:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) stocks have been some of the market’s biggest winners over the past few years, but not every chipmaker is benefiting equally from the AI boom. Some names are still facing pressure from higher component costs, softer end markets, and shifting customer demand.

That is now putting Qualcomm (QCOM) in the spotlight after Bernstein downgraded the stock and cut its price target, saying investors may be better off owning actual AI winners instead. While Qualcomm still trades at a relatively cheap valuation, the firm sees weaker smartphone demand and rising memory costs as headwinds that could limit upside.

More News from Barchart

S&P Futures Slip on Middle East Conflict Uncertainty and China Trade Probes

Exxon Mobil Is Now More Expensive Than Nvidia Stock. What Gives, and How Should You Play XOM Here?

AMD Stock Gets a Boost From Incoming CPU Price Hikes. Can it Touch $380 by 2027?

Get exclusive insights with the FREE Barchart Brief newsletter. Subscribe now for quick, incisive midday market analysis you won't find anywhere else.

Bernstein points to what it calls “actual AI winners,” highlighting companies like Nvidia (NVDA) and Amazon (AMZN). Both rank among Barchart’s top-rated stocks and are widely viewed as key players powering the rapid expansion of AI infrastructure.

Nvidia (NVDA)

Nvidia remains the clearest pure-play AI leader in the market, and its business shows how quickly demand for AI infrastructure is expanding. The company sits at the center of the AI boom, with its GPUs powering training and inference workloads across hyperscale data centers. CEO Jensen Huang has described this moment as the "AI inflection point,” and has forecast that the chip revenue could reach $1 trillion by 2027. Its next-generation chips, such as Blackwell and Vera Rubin, are expected to drive this next wave of demand.

That strength shows up in the stock, too. Nvidia has roughly doubled over the past two years, yet the valuation still looks reasonable relative to its growth pace because of its recent pullback in 2026. The stock currently trades at a forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio in the low-20x range, which is in line with the sector median and well below its own five-year average despite the company’s explosive expansion.

The latest financial results help explain why Nvidia is a frontrunner in the AI category. The chip company posted a record $68.1 billion in revenue, up 73% year-over-year, including a record $62.3 billion from its data center segment, which surged 75%. Net income reached $42.96 billion, rising 94%, while earnings per share (EPS) climbed 98% to $1.76. For the full fiscal year 2026, revenue jumped 65% to $215.9 billion, and the company returned $41.1 billion to shareholders.

Story Continues

Looking forward, for Nvidia’s next fiscal year, Wall Street currently expects about $7.66 a share in earnings and $369.4 billion in revenue. These impressive numbers indicate 69% EPS growth and about 71% revenue growth year-over-year.

Analysts remain overwhelmingly bullish. Barchart shows a “Strong Buy” consensus rating on NVDA, with an average 12-month price target around $269, implying roughly 56% upside from current levels.

For me, NVDA;s performance has cemented its AI supremacy. Its growth is phenomenal, its margins are enormous at 75%, and it is close to monopolizing GPUs. NVDA should fit the criteria of any investor interested in AI exposure.

Amazon (AMZN)

Amazon is far more than an online retailer. Its AWS cloud business sits at the center of the AI race, and that gives the company a much bigger role in the market than its e-commerce roots might suggest. Amazon has become one of the key infrastructure players behind artificial intelligence, while also working with major AI firms and developing its own chips to support the next wave of demand.

Amazon is also pushing deeper into AI through cloud tools, custom chips, and autonomous agents designed to help customers automate tasks and build applications faster. The company is backing that strategy with heavy capital spending, including plans to pour about $200 billion into investments, mostly for AI data centers and related infrastructure, in 2026.

The stock, however, has not fully reflected that story, yet. AMZN shares are down about 10% year to date (YTD). They currently trade near $207, as investors worry about heavy AI spending. While the valuation is not cheap at about 26x forward earnings and roughly 3x sales, Amazon has a long history of spending heavily today to build a stronger business later.

The latest numbers help explain the optimism. In the fourth quarter of 2025, Amazon reported $213.4 billion in net sales, up 14% from a year earlier, while AWS revenue rose 24% to $35.6 billion. Net income reached $21.2 billion, and earnings per share (EPS) came in at $1.95, compared with $1.86 a year earlier. Free cash flow declined to $11.2 billion as capital spending increased, but Wall Street still sees meaningful upside driven by cloud and AI demand.

Looking ahead, the Wall Street consensus estimate for full-year 2026 is about $7.78 in EPS and $807.1 billion to $807.6 billion in revenue, representing 8% and 13% growth, respectively, year-over-year.

Overall, the consensus for Amazon on Wall Street is “Strong Buy,” with an average price target of about $287. That implies expected 38% upside potential over current levels.

news.Title: 24檔除息股 僅半數邁向填息
news.Content:
除息旺季到，27日就有24檔除息股同場較勁，然受到台股走勢不佳影響，僅12檔成功邁向填息路，且填息狀況很慘澹，普遍填息率未及1成，僅剩高力和秀育異軍突起，實現一日填息的美夢，至於因卡位AI及記憶體備受市場關注的仁寶、華邦電更慘遭滑鐵盧，陷入貼息的窘境。

上市櫃公司去年獲利優，連帶股息派發也很大方，派息率有拉高傾向，其中更不乏超額配息股，據統計，27日除息的24檔個股有生合、宜進、仁寶、華邦電、精元、百容、卓越、米斯特、台灣精銳、東科-KY、禾聯碩、鋼聯、全宇昕、東捷資訊、叡揚、愛派司、汎瑋材料、聚賢研發-創、威力德生醫、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀育等。

其中，股息逾5元的高股息股包括台灣精銳、東科-KY、鋼聯、愛派司等4檔，分別以10元、近7.21元、5.3元、5元股息，拿下27日除息金額前四名，惟市場對高股息股似乎不太捧場，4檔填息率均未達1成，現金股利最多的台灣精銳，甚至還貼息。

成功踏上填息路的還有生合、百容、全宇昕、汎瑋、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀育，其中完成一日填息僅高力和秀育。至於市場關注的仁寶、華邦電就沒那麼幸運，因台股近期盤勢不佳，再加上記憶體需求傳雜音，填息路不平，雙雙陷入貼息窘境。

台股3月填息秀屢屢受阻，法人指出，與中東戰事不明，台股再陷整理行情。

news.Title: 3 Reasons Growth Investors Will Love Analog Devices (ADI)
news.Content:
Growth investors focus on stocks that are seeing above-average financial growth, as this feature helps these securities garner the market's attention and deliver solid returns. However, it isn't easy to find a great growth stock.

In addition to volatility, these stocks carry above-average risk by their very nature. Also, one could end up losing from a stock whose growth story is actually over or nearing its end.

However, the Zacks Growth Style Score (part of the Zacks Style Scores system), which looks beyond the traditional growth attributes to analyze a company's real growth prospects, makes it pretty easy to find cutting-edge growth stocks.

Analog Devices (ADI) is one such stock that our proprietary system currently recommends. The company not only has a favorable Growth Score, but also carries a top Zacks Rank.

Research shows that stocks carrying the best growth features consistently beat the market. And for stocks that have a combination of a Growth Score of A or B and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) or 2 (Buy), returns are even better.

Here are three of the most important factors that make the stock of this semiconductor maker a great growth pick right now.

Earnings Growth

Earnings growth is arguably the most important factor, as stocks exhibiting exceptionally surging profit levels tend to attract the attention of most investors. And for growth investors, double-digit earnings growth is definitely preferable, and often an indication of strong prospects (and stock price gains) for the company under consideration.

While the historical EPS growth rate for Analog Devices is 1%, investors should actually focus on the projected growth. The company's EPS is expected to grow 44% this year, crushing the industry average, which calls for EPS growth of 25.5%.

Cash Flow Growth

Cash is the lifeblood of any business, but higher-than-average cash flow growth is more beneficial and important for growth-oriented companies than for mature companies. That's because, high cash accumulation enables these companies to undertake new projects without raising expensive outside funds.

Right now, year-over-year cash flow growth for Analog Devices is 11%, which is higher than many of its peers. In fact, the rate compares to the industry average of -20.8%.

While investors should actually consider the current cash flow growth, it's worth taking a look at the historical rate too for putting the current reading into proper perspective. The company's annualized cash flow growth rate has been 17.3% over the past 3-5 years versus the industry average of 10.5%.

Story Continues

Promising Earnings Estimate Revisions

Beyond the metrics outlined above, investors should consider the trend in earnings estimate revisions. A positive trend is a plus here. Empirical research shows that there is a strong correlation between trends in earnings estimate revisions and near-term stock price movements.

The current-year earnings estimates for Analog Devices have been revising upward. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year has surged 1.1% over the past month.

Bottom Line

Analog Devices has not only earned a Growth Score of B based on a number of factors, including the ones discussed above, but it also carries a Zacks Rank #2 because of the positive earnings estimate revisions.

You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here.

This combination positions Analog Devices well for outperformance, so growth investors may want to bet on it.

news.Title: Can Intel's Core Ultra Series 3 Launch Propel Its Shares?
news.Content:
Intel Corporation INTC has introduced a new range of commercial computing products for modern workplaces, including business laptops, desktops and high-performance workstations with more than 125 device designs. The portfolio includes Intel Core Ultra Series 3 with Intel vPro for better performance, security and easy IT management. It also includes new Intel Arc Pro B-series graphics cards for high-performance and scalable workloads.

The Intel Core Ultra Series 3 is the key part of Intel’s new business platform, built on advanced Intel 18A technology. It offers faster performance, higher productivity, better graphics and integrated artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities compared with older systems, helping users work faster, multitasking easily and use AI for everyday tasks.

Combining with the enhanced Intel vPro platform, the portfolio improves security, device setup and management for businesses. The platform features include AI-based device IQ, which helps find and fix problems early, while fleet services make remote management easier with Microsoft Intune. Advanced tools like AI-based threat detection with Intel Threat Detection Technology and data encryption keep systems safer and easier to manage.

The companies' newly unveiled Intel Arc Pro B70 and B65 are built on the Xe2 architecture. These Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) are designed for creators, engineers and AI developers, with up to 32 Xe cores and 32GB VRAM. They offer strong performance and good value for AI tasks and professional graphics work.

Intel’s latest innovations bring together advanced processors, secure platforms and powerful graphics solutions. This helps businesses handle modern workloads more effectively while simplifying IT operations.

How Are Competitors Performing in Commercial Business?

Intel faces competition from Qualcomm Incorporated QCOM and Advanced Micro Devices AMD. Qualcomm is expanding its commercial business by focusing on AI-powered PCs with its Snapdragon X series chips, offering strong performance, long battery life, and built-in AI features for business laptops. It is working with leading PC makers like Asus, Acer, Dell Technologies, HP and Lenovo to build business laptops and devices. The company has launched the Snapdragon X2 Plus to support high-performance AI-powered commercial devices.

AMD has strengthened its commercial business by targeting enterprise and data center markets with high-performance CPUs and GPUs. It introduced new Ryzen AI 400 and PRO 400 series processors, which offer enhanced AI performance for both business and professional systems.AMD has introduced Helios, a rack-scale AI platform built to handle large enterprise and cloud AI workloads.

Story Continues

INTC’s Price Performance, Valuation & Estimates

Shares of Intel have surged 86.7% over the past year compared with the industry’s growth of 49.9%.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

Going by the price/book ratio, the company's shares currently trade at 1.74 book value, lower than 25.61 of the industry average.

INTC’s earnings estimates for 2026 have increased 4.4% to 48 cents per share, while those for 2027 have increased 4.4% to 95 cents over the past 60 days.

Intel stock currently carries a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell).

news.Title: AMAT vs. ACMR: Which WFE Stock is the Better Buy Right Now?
news.Content:
Applied Materials AMAT and ACM Research ACMR are two of the most crucial wafer equipment manufacturing (WFE) companies in the world, serving two different verticals. AMAT has the broadest and most diversified offerings as it provides solutions across multiple fabrication steps, like deposition, materials engineering, etch, metrology and packaging. ACMR is a near monopoly in wafer cleaning technology while also providing advanced packaging steps.

Both AMAT and ACMR have become crucial in the AI infrastructure market, bringing investors’ attention to their business models, risk profiles and long-term outlook. Let’s break down how each company is performing and which one looks like the better investment right now.

The Case for AMAT Stock

Applied Materials is a major manufacturer of semiconductor fabrication equipment, covering deposition, etching and inspection, serving the most crucial stages of chip manufacturing. AMAT expects its leading-edge foundry, logic, DRAM and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to be the fastest-growing wafer fabrication equipment businesses in 2026.

Applied Materials expects its leading-edge foundry, logic, DRAM and HBM to be the fastest-growing wafer fabrication equipment businesses in 2026. In Logic, AMAT’s revenues are driven by the shift from FinFET to Gate-All-Around (GAA) transistors and backside power delivery.

The company specializes in GAA transistors at 2nm and below, HBM stacking and hybrid bonding and 3D device metrology, which are indispensable for manufacturing next-generation semiconductor chips. Recent launches like Xtera epi, Kinex hybrid bonding and PROVision 10 eBeam will add to AMAT’s growth story throughout 2026 and beyond.

AMAT’s DRAM offerings are gaining traction as customers are aggressively investing in 6F² nodes supported by rising demand for high bandwidth memory DRAM, driven by AI workloads. On its first-quarter 2026 earnings call, AMAT highlighted its record growth in both Logic and DRAM segments, driven by major semiconductor transitions.

Applied Materials’ HBM chips are increasing in complexity and size, with three to four times more wafer starts per bit than standard DRAM, making it highly equipment-intensive. This is good for AMAT as the market for HBM expands. Together, these factors will drive the top and bottom lines of AMAT. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Applied Materials’ fiscal 2026 earnings suggests growth of 18%. The estimates for fiscal 2026 have been revised upward in the past 60 days.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

The Case for ACMR Stock

ACM Research is gaining from increased complexity in semiconductor design as layer count and defect sensitivity are increasing the number of cleaning process steps. These factors have given rise to higher demand for high-performance cleaning tools, evident in growing demand for ACMR’s WFE products in Singapore, North America, Korea and Taiwan.

Story Continues

ACMR is trying to match this demand surge through capacity expansion, with Lingang and Oregon now supporting a $3 billion annual output. Furthermore, ACMR has a greater advantage in the market with its proprietary technology, like N2 bubbling technology for 3D NAND, SPM Nozzle design and horizontal plating.

Among these offerings, SPM cleaning is considered to be a high-margin underpenetrated business, supercritical CO2 cleaning that reduces 40% of the cost and other jewels like track systems, PECVD platforms, Panel-level plating tools and expected breakthroughs like ALD, PEALD, LPCVD are a major tailwind for the company.

ACMR’s advanced packaging grew 45% year over year in 2025, driven by increased process intensity and high demand from AI data centers and hyperscalers. These factors are likely to contribute to ACMR’s top line in the upcoming years. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for ACMR’s fiscal 2026 earnings suggests growth of 5.6%. The estimate for fiscal 2026 have been revised upward in the past 30 days.

AMAT vs. ACMR: Price Performance & Valuation Check

AMAT shares have surged 133.4% in the past year, and ACMR has soared 67.4%.

12-Month Performance Chart

On the valuation front, Applied Materials trades at a forward 12-month price-to-sales (P/S) ratio of 8.05, higher than the median of 5.52. ACMR trades at a forward P/S multiple of 2.09, higher than its median of 1.85.

Forward 12-Month (P/S) Valuation Chart

Conclusion: AMAT vs. ACMR

While Applied Materials remains a high-quality, industry-leading semiconductor equipment company with strong exposure to leading-edge nodes, memory and HBM, ACMR is positioned at the intersection of several powerful structural tailwinds — rising process complexity, increasing cleaning intensity, and the rapid shift toward advanced packaging driven by AI workloads, ensuring multiyear growth. Given these factors, ACMR is a better buy than AMAT at present.

AMAT carries a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) at present, while ACMR sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

news.Title: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Texas Instruments' Report
news.Content:
With a market cap of $176.1 billion, Texas Instruments Incorporated (TXN) designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductors used by electronics designers and manufacturers across global markets. It operates through its Analog and Embedded Processing segments, offering products like power management solutions, signal chain components, microcontrollers, and processors for industries including automotive, industrial, and personal electronics.

The Dallas, Texas-based company is slated to announce its fiscal Q1 2026 results soon. Ahead of the release, analysts predict the company to report EPS of $1.37, up over 7% from $1.28 in the year-ago quarter. It has exceeded Wall Street's earnings expectations in three of the past four quarters while missing on another occasion.

More News from Barchart

For fiscal 2026, analysts expect the chipmaker to report EPS of $6.35, an increase of 16.5% from $5.45 in fiscal 2025. Looking forward, EPS is projected to grow 19.7% year-over-year to $7.60 in fiscal 2027.

Shares of Texas Instruments have gained 6.2% over the past 52 weeks, lagging behind the broader S&P 500 Index's ($SPX) 13.4% return and the State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF's (XLK) 24.2% surge over the same period.

Shares of Texas Instruments climbed 9.9% following its Q4 2025 results on Jan. 27. It forecast stronger-than-expected Q1 revenue of $4.32 billion - $4.68 billion and EPS of $1.22 - $1.48. The upbeat outlook was driven by surging AI-related demand, with data center revenue rising 70% in Q4 and contributing 9% of total 2025 sales, alongside a broader industrial recovery with revenue growing in the “high tens” percentage.

Investors were also encouraged by signs the analog chip inventory glut is ending, positioning TI for accelerating growth despite a slight Q4 revenue miss of $4.42 billion.

Analysts' consensus view on TXN stock remains cautiously optimistic, with a "Moderate Buy" rating overall. Out of 35 analysts covering the stock, 12 recommend a "Strong Buy," 18 "Holds," one "Moderate Sell," and four "Strong Sells." This configuration is slightly less bullish than three months ago, with 13 analysts suggesting a "Strong Buy."

Story Continues

The average analyst price target for Texas Instruments is $220.72, indicating a potential upside of 14.1% from the current levels.

news.Title: Can Advanced Packaging Demand Accelerate LRCX's Long-Term Growth?
news.Content:
Lam Research LRCX is witnessing strong growth in its advanced packaging business, which is being driven by the need to build more complex chips on the back of strong AI demand. As chipmakers look to improve performance and memory bandwidth, advanced packaging is becoming an important area in both memory and logic production. This demand is driving LRCX's advanced packaging business to play a key role in the company's growth story.

Lam Research expects its advanced packaging business to grow more than 40% in fiscal 2026, which is faster than its expected growth in wafer fab equipment spending for this area. A major reason is the shift to newer memory products like HBM4 and HBM4E, which need more advanced packaging and stacking of up to 16 layers. This bodes well for LRCX's prospects as the company has leadership in electroplating and TSV etch, both of which are important steps in advanced packaging.

This opportunity is not limited to memory. Advanced packaging is becoming more important in foundry and logic, where chipmakers are using more complex package designs to improve performance and add more functions. Management had earlier estimated advanced packaging to be a mid-single-digit percentage of foundry/logic equipment spending, but now expects that number to move higher. This shows that advanced packaging is becoming a larger spending area across the semiconductor industry.

The above-mentioned factors show that advanced packaging is becoming a major growth driver for LRCX. As AI systems require more memory, faster data movement and tighter chip integration, spending on advanced packaging is likely to keep rising. If this trend continues, it can support Lam Research’s overall growth over the next few years. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2026 and 2027 revenues indicates a year-over-year increase of around 21% and 22.1%, respectively.

How Competitors Fare Against LRCX

AMAT competes with companies like Applied Materials AMAT and ASML Holdings ASML in the semiconductor equipment market.

Applied Materials recently expanded its partnership with Micron to build better memory chips for AI. Here, the goal is to develop next-generation DRAM, high-bandwidth memory and NAND solutions to increase speed and performance while reducing power use. The work will be done at AMAT’s EPIC Center in Silicon Valley and Micron’s R&D center in Boise, ID. Teams from both companies will work together to speed up development and move ideas into production faster.

ASML is witnessing strong demand from DRAM and logic customers, which are ramping leading-edge nodes using ASML’s NXE:3800E EUV systems. ASML noted that multiple DRAM customers are adopting EUV lithography, which helps in shortening cycle time and lowering costs.

Story Continues

LRCX’s Share Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Shares of Lam Research have surged 62.7% over the past six months compared with the Zacks Electronics – Semiconductors industry’s return of 10.2%.

LRCX 6-Month Price Return Performance

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

From a valuation standpoint, Lam Research trades at a forward price-to-sales ratio of 10.21, significantly higher than the industry’s average of 7.5.

Lam Research Forward 12-Month P/S Ratio

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Lam Research’s fiscal 2026 and 2027 earnings implies a year-over-year increase of approximately 26.6% and 27%, respectively. Estimates for fiscal 2026 and 2027 have been revised upward over the past 60 and 30 days, respectively.

news.Title: QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
news.Content:
Qualcomm (QCOM) is one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com visitors lately. So, it might be a good idea to review some of the factors that might affect the near-term performance of the stock.

Over the past month, shares of this chipmaker have returned -10.3%, compared to the Zacks S&P 500 composite's -6.2% change. During this period, the Zacks Electronics - Semiconductors industry, which Qualcomm falls in, has lost 3.9%. The key question now is: What could be the stock's future direction?

Although media reports or rumors about a significant change in a company's business prospects usually cause its stock to trend and lead to an immediate price change, there are always certain fundamental factors that ultimately drive the buy-and-hold decision.

Earnings Estimate Revisions

Rather than focusing on anything else, we at Zacks prioritize evaluating the change in a company's earnings projection. This is because we believe the fair value for its stock is determined by the present value of its future stream of earnings.

Our analysis is essentially based on how sell-side analysts covering the stock are revising their earnings estimates to take the latest business trends into account. When earnings estimates for a company go up, the fair value for its stock goes up as well. And when a stock's fair value is higher than its current market price, investors tend to buy the stock, resulting in its price moving upward. Because of this, empirical studies indicate a strong correlation between trends in earnings estimate revisions and short-term stock price movements.

For the current quarter, Qualcomm is expected to post earnings of $2.58 per share, indicating a change of -9.5% from the year-ago quarter. The Zacks Consensus Estimate has changed -2.6% over the last 30 days.

The consensus earnings estimate of $11.16 for the current fiscal year indicates a year-over-year change of -7.2%. This estimate has changed -1.6% over the last 30 days.

For the next fiscal year, the consensus earnings estimate of $11.41 indicates a change of +2.2% from what Qualcomm is expected to report a year ago. Over the past month, the estimate has changed -1.5%.

With an impressive externally audited track record, our proprietary stock rating tool -- the Zacks Rank -- is a more conclusive indicator of a stock's near-term price performance, as it effectively harnesses the power of earnings estimate revisions. The size of the recent change in the consensus estimate, along with three other factors related to earnings estimates, has resulted in a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) for Qualcomm.

Story Continues

The chart below shows the evolution of the company's forward 12-month consensus EPS estimate:

12 Month EPS

Projected Revenue Growth

While earnings growth is arguably the most superior indicator of a company's financial health, nothing happens as such if a business isn't able to grow its revenues. After all, it's nearly impossible for a company to increase its earnings for an extended period without increasing its revenues. So, it's important to know a company's potential revenue growth.

In the case of Qualcomm, the consensus sales estimate of $10.64 billion for the current quarter points to a year-over-year change of -1.8%. The $43.48 billion and $44.37 billion estimates for the current and next fiscal years indicate changes of -1.5% and +2%, respectively.

Last Reported Results and Surprise History

Qualcomm reported revenues of $12.25 billion in the last reported quarter, representing a year-over-year change of +5%. EPS of $3.5 for the same period compares with $3.41 a year ago.

Compared to the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $12.28 billion, the reported revenues represent a surprise of -0.26%. The EPS surprise was +3.24%.

The company beat consensus EPS estimates in each of the trailing four quarters. The company topped consensus revenue estimates two times over this period.

Valuation

Without considering a stock's valuation, no investment decision can be efficient. In predicting a stock's future price performance, it's crucial to determine whether its current price correctly reflects the intrinsic value of the underlying business and the company's growth prospects.

While comparing the current values of a company's valuation multiples, such as price-to-earnings (P/E), price-to-sales (P/S), and price-to-cash flow (P/CF), with its own historical values helps determine whether its stock is fairly valued, overvalued, or undervalued, comparing the company relative to its peers on these parameters gives a good sense of the reasonability of the stock's price.

As part of the Zacks Style Scores system, the Zacks Value Style Score (which evaluates both traditional and unconventional valuation metrics) organizes stocks into five groups ranging from A to F (A is better than B; B is better than C; and so on), making it helpful in identifying whether a stock is overvalued, rightly valued, or temporarily undervalued.

Qualcomm is graded D on this front, indicating that it is trading at a premium to its peers. Click here to see the values of some of the valuation metrics that have driven this grade.

Bottom Line

The facts discussed here and much other information on Zacks.com might help determine whether or not it's worthwhile paying attention to the market buzz about Qualcomm. However, its Zacks Rank #5 does suggest that it may underperform the broader market in the near term.

news.Title: 外資賣超384億元 減碼友達、台積電各3.2萬張、1.1萬張 單周賣超1030億元
news.Content:
台股今 (27) 日開低收低，加權指數終場下跌 225.03 點，收在 33,112.59 點，成交量縮至 6,582.73 億元 (含盤後交易)，三大法人賣超共 401.86 億元，外資今日賣超 384.71 億元，連 2 日賣超。其中外資由賣轉買華邦電 (2344-TW)2.4 萬張最高，大砍面板股友達 (2409-TW)3.2 萬張最多，也賣超台積電 (2330-TW)1.11 萬張，連 2 賣。

台股本周周線翻黑下跌 431.29 點，累計外資單周賣超 1030.29 億元；3 月以來台股下跌 2301.9 點，同一期間外資賣超高達 8235.31 億元，已是單月最大賣超紀錄。

今日外資賣超 384.71 億元、自營商賣超約 17.95 億元；投信則買超約 7,981 萬元，三大法人合計約賣超 401.86 億元。在期貨部分，外資空單增加 2,828 口，外資期貨淨空單約 4 萬口。

外資買超前 10 名個股中，買超最多首位為華邦電 2.41 萬張，其次為仁寶 2.24 萬張，啟碁、中租 - KY、華通各為 1 萬張，旺宏 9,963 張、燿華 7,385 張、長榮航 7,239 張、建漢 5,670 張、王道銀行 5,518 張。

外資賣超前 10 名則以友達 3.2 萬張居首，其次為聯合再生 1.94 萬張、力基電 1.64 萬張、中石化 1.59 萬張、台新新光金 1.54 萬張、國泰金 1.17 萬張、台積電 1.11 萬張、群創 1.02 萬張、聯電 9,054 張、正文 7,374 張。

投信買超前 10 名中，共有 4 檔金融股，買超台新新光金首位 1.26 萬張、中信金 4,654 居次，華通 2,814 張、國泰金 2,613 張、瑞軒 2,000 張、富邦金 1,782 張、大聯大 1,482 張、南電 1,180 張、台塑 1,106 張、聯電。

投信賣超前 10 名部分，仁寶賣超 2.08 萬張最高，南亞 8,985 張、南亞科 7,434 張、華邦電 6,084 張、旺宏 2,588 張、京元電子 1,954 張、新日興 1,628 張、遠傳 1,212 張、漢唐及聯發科 784 張。

法人表示，美伊戰爭局勢未明，台股後市不安定因素仍多，市場觀望氣氛濃厚，指數今日雖守住 33,000 點整數關卡，以黑 K 棒留長下影線作收，但以技術面觀察，月線轉為下彎，目前需要時間消化上檔賣壓，中東危機仍是全球市場關注焦點，在市場追價力道不足，資金轉趨保守情況下，短期內指數將呈現較大幅度震盪格局。

news.Title: 台股3萬3保衛戰有驚無險 神山熄火低軌衛星自己飛｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
美國總統川普再度對伊朗發出強硬警告，市場對中東局勢升溫的憂慮推升油價走揚，加上Meta Platforms與記憶體類股同步重挫，拖累美股四大指數全面收黑。道瓊工業指數跌1.01%，那斯達克指數跌1.74%，標普500指數跌2.38%，費城半導體指數更重挫4.79%。個股方面，科技股與半導體成為重災區，Meta大跌7.96%，除了AI競爭壓力外，也受Cathie Wood調節持股、裁員與訴訟判賠消息干擾；AMD、英特爾在前一日受CPU報價題材激勵大漲後，分別回落7.49%、6.53%，反映短線利多出盡後的獲利了結賣壓；記憶體股則持續受Google新演算法TurboQuant可能壓抑需求的疑慮影響，美光下跌約7%，Sandisk跌逾10%，台積電ADR也下挫6.22%

亞股表現漲跌互見。日股下跌0.43%，韓股小跌0.40%；港股走強0.38%，上證指數漲0.63%。整體來看，亞洲市場並未完全跟隨美股全面重挫，但買盤追價意願仍偏審慎。

回到台股，加權指數今(27)日終場下跌225.03點，收33,112.59點，成交金額6,320.74億元，周線收黑。 台積電(2330) 收跌20元，持續成為壓抑指數的重要權值股。不過盤面並非全面熄火，低軌衛星題材續強，CPO概念股也有資金點火；傳產則由塑化股接棒， 台聚(1304) 漲逾2%， 台達化(1309) 連兩天鎖漲停。相較之下，記憶體族群在 南亞科(2408) 私募題材失靈後續挫，多檔等同步承壓，也讓今日盤面呈現題材股強、電子權值與記憶體偏弱的分歧格局。

📝盤點熱門股：燿華、力積電、群創

今日熱門成交股方面，買盤分散在低軌衛星、記憶體、面板與ETF。 燿華(2367) 以33.99萬張居冠，也是前五名中唯一收紅個股，受低軌衛星題材續熱帶動，在SpaceX上市想像與盤面點火效應下，資金明顯持續追捧。

記憶體族群則是賣壓與短線資金同步湧現， 力積電(6770) 、 華邦電(2344) 雙雙擠進前五，主要仍受南亞科私募題材失靈拖累，南亞科摜破私募定價後，相關記憶體股跟著承壓，成交明顯放大。至於面板股 群創(3481) 雖然小跌，但成交量仍高，顯示震盪盤下人氣股依舊吸引短線資金反覆進出； 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 同樣名列前段，股價小跌，反映在大盤走弱之際，資金透過台股ETF進行布局與調節的力道也同步升溫。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超401.86億元，其中外資賣壓最重，單日賣超384.71億元，已連續兩個交易日站在賣方；自營商同步調節17.95億元，僅投信小幅買超0.8億元，顯示內資護盤力道相對有限。從盤面氛圍來看，外資大舉提款，市場解讀與周末前先行降低部位、預防消息面變數有關，也讓台股在震盪盤下持續承受較大籌碼壓力。

✨本日議題股：低軌衛星概念股

在中東戰事干擾台股震盪之際，資金反而湧向具太空題材與高毛利想像空間的族群，其中 華通(2313) 表現最受矚目，不僅在低軌衛星雙王帶動下強勢衝高、改寫波段新高，更一度以成交金額力壓 台積電(2330) 成為台股「吸金王」；盤面上 昇達科(3491) 續強， 建漢(3062) 、 台揚(2314) 等低價衛星股也同步點火，顯示市場對低軌衛星供應鏈的追價意願仍高。分析師指出...... 點我看更多

👥鴻海股利香：

鴻海(2317) 豪發「7.2元股利」效應發酵，雖然股價先前一度回到市場戲稱的「郭董退休價」，卻反而吸引逾8萬名散戶逆勢進場，推升股東人數衝破119萬人、改寫歷史新高，顯示高股利題材仍對存股族與中實戶具相當吸引力；若以配息規模來看，鴻海此次預計發出逾千億元現金股利，創辦人郭台銘以持股優勢可望豪領..... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周一（3/30）國際財經展望，當日較無重大數據公布。轉為聚焦國內，當天市場焦點將回到企業動態，法說會包括 三芳(1307) 、 宜鼎(5289) 、 樺漢(6414) 、 群翊(6664) 、 大江(8436) 等，後續釋出的營運展望與接單看法值得留意；此外， 統領(2910) 、 集雅社(2937) 、 嘉實(3158) 、 全訊(5222) 除息表現，以及 倍利科(7822) 轉上市、 公勝保經(6028) 轉上櫃，也都有機會成為盤面題材。

news.Title: 《台北股市》三大法人27日買超前十大 華邦電摘冠 低軌衛星同樂會
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】台股27日加權指數收33112.59點，跌225.03點或0.68%，總成交值6521.10億元。三大法人賣超401.86億元，其中外資賣超384.71億元，投信、自營商分別買超0.80億元及賣超17.95億元。

三大法人買超前十大個股，依類別分，6檔電子股、2檔金融股及2檔傳產股；依股價分，4檔百元股、2檔中價位股及4檔銅板股；買超張數方面，5檔買超上萬張，榜首為華邦電(2344)，買超2萬580張，華通(2313)、旺宏(2337)名列二、三名，分別買超1萬2215張及買超1萬1768張。第四及第五名為啟碁(6285)、中租-KY(5871)，其他依序為燿華(2367)、長榮航(2618)、建漢(3062)、玉山金(2884)及王道銀行(2897)。

至於前十大個股中買超金額前三大，則為華通(2313)32.98億元、啟碁(6285)22.10億元、華邦電(2344)19.02億元。

●三大法人27日買超前十名：

1.華邦電(2344)收92.40元，股價持平，成交量15.92萬張，三大法人買超2萬580張、估19.02億元，由連3日累計賣超10萬3592張轉為買超。

2.華通(2313)收270.00元，漲24.50元或9.98%，成交量15.62萬張，三大法人買超1萬2215張、估32.98億元，為連3日買超，累計買超6萬7107張、估163.76億元。

3.旺宏(2337)收125.00元，跌3.00元或2.34%，成交量4.78萬張，三大法人買超1萬1768張、估14.71億元，為連4日買超，累計買超2萬9244張、估38.19億元。

4.啟碁(6285)收188.50元，漲16.50元或9.59%，成交量4.69萬張，三大法人買超1萬1722張、估22.10億元，由前一交易日賣超5569張轉為買超。

news.Title: 除息行情受阻 24檔除息股僅半數踏上填息路 一日填息夢剩二檔實現
news.Content:
除息旺季到，光今日就有24檔除息股同場較勁，然受到台股走勢不佳影響，今日24檔除息股中僅12檔成功邁向填息路，且填息狀況很慘澹，普遍填息率未及一成，僅剩高力（8996）和秀育（6737）異軍突起，實現一日填息的美夢，至於因卡位AI及記憶體備受市場關注的仁寶（2324）、華邦電（2344）今日的填息秀則慘遭滑鐵盧，陷入貼息的窘境。

台灣上市櫃公司去年獲利優，連帶股息派發也很大方，派息率有拉高傾向，其中更不乏賺二毛給一塊的超額配息股，經統計，訂在今日除息的24檔個股包含生合、宜進、仁寶、華邦電、精元、百容、卓越、米斯特、台灣精銳、東科-KY、禾聯碩、鋼聯、全宇昕、東捷資訊、叡揚、愛派司、汎瑋材料、聚賢研發-創、威力德生醫、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀育。

其中股息逾5元的高股息股以東科-KY、鋼聯、愛派司名列前三名，分別以7.20999801、5.3元、5元股息分別拿下今日派息金額前三名，在市場捧場下，今日均小幅填息０點二元和０點五元，惟填息率均未及一成。

另今日成功踏上填息路的還有生合、百容，全宇昕、愛派司、汎瑋、白紗科、青鋼、明安、高力、秀蝴育，其中完成一日填息的高力，息值4.55520782元，以終場上漲25元換算，填息率達549％，秀育因息值較低僅0.8元，今日雖僅上漲1.04元，但也順利爆出130％的填息率，至於，全宇昕上漲3元，以含息4元計，填息率75％。

至於市場關注的仁寶、華邦電就沒那麼幸運，因台股近期盤勢不佳，再加上記憶體需求傳雜音，填息路不平，雙雙陷入貼息窘境。

news.Title: Can AI Data Center Demand Accelerate ADI's Long-Term Growth?
news.Content:
Analog Devices ADI highlighted data centers as one of its strongest growth areas on the first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings call. Analog Devices' automated test equipment (ATE) and data center businesses together now make up close to 20% of total revenues and represent a run rate of more than $2 billion. The company's data center business grew about 50% in fiscal 2025 and saw accelerated growth again in the first quarter of fiscal 2026. This suggests that AI data center demand is becoming a more meaningful driver of ADI’s business.

The main driver is higher power demand in AI data centers. AI servers require more power and tighter control as workloads become more complex. This is driving the demand for ADI's hot swap and protection products, which help move larger amounts of energy safely across racks. Further, ADI is also witnessing rising demand for point-of-load converters, high-performance regulators, power system management ICs and multiphase controllers. ADI has already shipped its smart power stage to its first vertical power customer and is seeing faster adoption of intermediate bus converter modules for 48V and 54V systems.

The company is also benefiting from growth in optical connectivity. AI is increasing the amount of data that needs to move within and between data centers. This is where ADI's precision control, monitoring, temperature regulation and power management solutions help customers to improve speed, reduce power usage and lower overall costs.

The above-mentioned factors show that ADI’s data center business is gaining scale and is supported by clear AI-driven demand in power and optical solutions. If this momentum continues, it can become a key long-term growth driver for the company. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2026 revenues is pegged at 13.79 billion, indicating a year-over-year increase of around 25.1%.

How Competitors Fare Against ADI

ADI faces stiff competition from Broadcom AVGO and Advanced Micro Devices AMD in the AI infrastructure space.

Broadcom is a leader in the domain of custom silicon solutions for data centres. Broadcom’s advanced 3.5D XDSiP packaging platform is critical to ensure the performance and efficiency of custom AI XPUs. Broadcom’s Semiconductor segment, which accounts for its custom silicon solutions, has experienced massive growth in the past several quarters.

Advanced Micro Devices is another established player in the custom silicon solutions and AI accelerator market. AMD offers semi-custom SoCs and Instinct Accelerators to power data centers. Further, Advanced Micro Devices’ reconfigurable Alveo Adaptable Accelerator Cards are critical for compute-intensive applications in data centers.

Story Continues

ADI’s Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Shares of ADI have gained 31.5% in the past six months compared with the Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry’s growth of 20%.

ADI 6-Month Performance Chart

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

From a valuation standpoint, ADI trades at a forward price-to-sales ratio of 11.03X, higher than the industry’s average of 8.37X.

ADI Forward 12-Month (P/S) Performance Chart

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for ADI’s fiscal 2026 and 2027 earnings implies year-over-year growth of 44% and 10.8%, respectively. The consensus estimate for fiscal 2026 and 2027 has been revised upward in the past 30 days.

news.Title: 記憶體反彈「南科」一夢？台聚集團搭「塑膠袋之亂」題材紅通通｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
隨著伊朗開始檢視美方停火提議、並允許非敵對船隻通過荷姆茲海峽，油價回落，市場風險情緒略見降溫，美股四大指數全面收漲。道瓊工業指數漲0.66%，那斯達克指數漲0.77%，標普500指數漲0.54%，費城半導體指數漲1.21%。科技股方面，Arm因宣布跨足自研AI資料中心晶片、描繪新成長藍圖，股價飆漲約16%；英特爾與AMD則受CPU漲價題材激勵，雙雙大漲逾7%；不過Google發表可大幅壓縮AI記憶體需求的新演算法，引發市場對記憶體需求降溫的疑慮，美光與Sandisk分別下跌3.4%、3.5%，台積電ADR則上漲1.31%。

亞股今天普遍走弱，日股下跌0.27%，韓股重挫3.22%；陸港股方面，港股下挫1.89%；上證指數則走弱1.09%。

回到台股，加權指數今(26)日終場下跌101.49點，收在33,337.62點，成交金額7,378.12億元，雖然早盤一度衝上33,892.56點、漲逾450點，但隨後賣壓出籠，終場收在最低點； 台積電(2330) 收1,840元，下跌5元，尾盤遭摜壓，成為指數翻黑的重要壓力來源。盤面上， 鴻海(2317) 、 日月光投控(3711) 相對撐盤，低軌衛星族群續強，多檔亮燈漲停；傳產股則由塑化、造紙接棒。至於原先受私募題材激勵的記憶體族群，在 南亞科(2408) 盤中漲停翻黑後，接連走弱，也讓熱度快速降溫。

📝盤點熱門股：力積電、燿華、群創

今日熱門成交股方面，買盤主要分散在記憶體、低軌衛星與面板族群。 力積電(6770) 以28.73萬張續居冠，受南亞科私募題材失靈影響，股價震盪、短線資金進出積極；而記憶體族群的 華邦電(2344) 、 南亞科(2408) 雙雙擠進前五，但股價同步開高走低，南亞科雖有私募題材，開盤即飆漲停，但利多效應快速淡化，也讓相關沾光概念的想像空間降溫。

燿華(2367) 則是前五名中唯一收紅個股，市場傳出SpaceX本週有望申請上市，讓低軌衛星概念續獲資金追捧，成交同步放大； 群創(3481) 也是受到同樣題材的帶動，股價雖然小跌，但成交量仍高，顯示人氣股在盤面震盪下依舊吸引短線資金反覆進出。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超2.93億元，整體籌碼面偏向觀望。外資賣超79.20億元，轉為站在賣方，顯示在盤勢震盪之際，外部資金態度略偏保守；不過內資仍有承接力道，投信買超43.32億元，持續站在買方，自營商也買超32.95億元。整體來看，今天呈現外資提款、投信與自營商同步撐盤的格局，雖然三大法人合計小幅賣超，但內資買盤仍對台股形成一定支撐。

✨本日議題股：台聚集團

台聚集團今成盤面最強議題股之一，受中東戰火延燒、伊朗油田遇襲與運輸受阻影響，帶動石油、天然氣及塑化原料報價走揚，也讓二線塑化族群成為資金避風港；盤中 台聚(1304) 、 華夏(1305) 、 亞聚(1308) 、 台達化(1309) 一度整排亮燈漲停，市場同步點火「塑膠袋之亂」與缺料題材，連台塑四寶也跟進走強。分析師指出...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周五國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，市場將關注美國3月密大消費者信心指數表現，作為觀察通膨預期、就業信心與終端消費動能的重要指標；歐洲方面，焦點落在歐元區2月消費者通膨預期，以及英國GfK 3月消費者信心指數、2月零售額等數據，市場將評估歐洲家庭消費力道與景氣復甦節奏；亞太區方面，留意韓國3月企業信心指數出爐，此外墨西哥央行也將公布最新利率決策，牽動新興市場貨幣政策走向；港澳方面，市場將關注大陸今年前兩月規模以上工業企業利潤表現，以判斷工業部門獲利修復情況，另外港股的比亞迪電子、長城汽車也將公布2025年第四季與全年財報，市場將聚焦車市需求、毛利率變化與後續營運展望。

台灣方面，國內焦點包括央行公布2月票據交換金額與退票率，中大台經中心發布3月消費者信心指數(CCI)調查，以及Agri-X Forum農業跨域趨勢論壇等議題；企業動態則以法說會、除權息與個股異動為主，法說會可留意幾家重要大廠，包括 友達(2409) 、 國泰金(2882) 、 聯成(1313) 、 中航(2612) 、 大世科(8099) 與 東生華(8432) 等，市場將關注面板市況、金融業獲利動能、化工與生技產業後市展望；除權息方面， 仁寶(2324) 、 華邦電(2344) 、 禾聯碩(5283) 、 高力(8996) 等個股將除息， 台汽電(8926) 則進行除權，可留意短線資金布局與填權息表現；另外， 晶睿(3454) 將下市，也將成為市場關注焦點。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

news.Title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
news.Content:
In the latest trading session, Texas Instruments (TXN) closed at $196.77, marking a +1.1% move from the previous day. The stock's change was more than the S&P 500's daily gain of 0.54%. Meanwhile, the Dow experienced a rise of 0.66%, and the technology-dominated Nasdaq saw an increase of 0.77%.

The chipmaker's shares have seen a decrease of 8.77% over the last month, not keeping up with the Computer and Technology sector's loss of 5% and the S&P 500's loss of 4.71%.

The investment community will be paying close attention to the earnings performance of Texas Instruments in its upcoming release. The company's upcoming EPS is projected at $1.37, signifying a 7.03% increase compared to the same quarter of the previous year. Simultaneously, our latest consensus estimate expects the revenue to be $4.52 billion, showing a 11.01% escalation compared to the year-ago quarter.

For the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates are projecting earnings of $6.35 per share and revenue of $19.37 billion, which would represent changes of +16.51% and +9.57%, respectively, from the prior year.

Additionally, investors should keep an eye on any recent revisions to analyst forecasts for Texas Instruments. Recent revisions tend to reflect the latest near-term business trends. Consequently, upward revisions in estimates express analysts' positivity towards the business operations and its ability to generate profits.

Our research shows that these estimate changes are directly correlated with near-term stock prices. To take advantage of this, we've established the Zacks Rank, an exclusive model that considers these estimated changes and delivers an operational rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, which ranges from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has an impressive outside-audited track record of outperformance, with #1 stocks generating an average annual return of +25% since 1988. Over the past month, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has shifted 0.32% upward. Currently, Texas Instruments is carrying a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

With respect to valuation, Texas Instruments is currently being traded at a Forward P/E ratio of 30.65. This represents a premium compared to its industry average Forward P/E of 30.47.

We can also see that TXN currently has a PEG ratio of 1.77. This popular metric is similar to the widely-known P/E ratio, with the difference being that the PEG ratio also takes into account the company's expected earnings growth rate. As the market closed yesterday, the Semiconductor - General industry was having an average PEG ratio of 1.77.

The Semiconductor - General industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. This industry currently has a Zacks Industry Rank of 167, which puts it in the bottom 32% of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank gauges the strength of our industry groups by measuring the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

news.Title: Can Qualcomm's Advanced AI Camera for Security & IoT Drive Profits?
news.Content:
Qualcomm Incorporated QCOM is leading a transformation in the evolving physical security industry by moving from traditional cameras to smart, artificial intelligence (AI)-powered systems. These next-generation cameras not only record videos but also make real-time decisions, support continuous learning and offer fleet-wide scalability.

Chips, software and large-scale device management are the three key parts on which Qualcomm’s AI camera platform is built. Its advanced chips deliver strong performance while using less power, making them suitable for both home and professional cameras. With easy-to-use software tools like a unified Linux/Yocto SDK and Edge Impulse, developers can create AI features once and use them on many devices, saving time and cost. Managing cameras at scale also allows companies to update features regularly and generate ongoing revenues from their products.

The Qualcomm Insight Platform makes cameras smarter by turning video into useful information. AI runs directly on the device, enabling semantic understanding, answering simple queries and keeping data private without sending videos to the cloud. It can also upgrade older cameras using edge AI devices, adding smart features without replacing existing systems.

The company's camera solutions are used in many areas, such as security cameras, body cameras, dash cameras and industrial Internet of Things (IoT). They offer clear images even in low light, support multiple cameras, include AI features and have strong connectivity like Wi-Fi and 5G. Through partnerships with other companies, these solutions are used in fields like law enforcement, healthcare, industrial work and fleet management.

By combining advanced chips, easy-to-use AI tools, and a unified platform, Qualcomm Technologies helps companies use AI cameras across many devices. This enables businesses to build smarter, more efficient camera systems and grow their services at scale in the IoT and security industry.

How Are Competitors Performing?

Qualcomm faces competition from NXP Semiconductors N.V. NXPI and Analog Devices, Inc. ADI. NXP is focusing on edge AI to make devices like machines, robots and smart systems more intelligent, while also building secure IoT solutions that protect data and connectivity. It offers tools like EdgeLock to keep devices safe and prevent hacking. The company has also launched new processors and AI tools to improve edge computing and secure wireless connections in IoT and security applications.

Analog Devices is developing smart sensors and edge AI, allowing devices to process data on their own. It is also working on cybersecurity to protect IoT and industrial systems. The company is upgrading low-power AI chips to keep devices efficient and enhance secure connectivity for device safety. Analog Devices has launched an expanded CodeFusion Studio platform, which helps developers build IoT systems faster while ensuring strong data security and efficiency at the edge.

Story Continues

QCOM’s Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Qualcomm shares have lost 18.8% over the past year against the industry’s growth of 71.1%.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

Going by the price/earnings ratio, the company's shares currently trade at 11.4 forward earnings, lower than 27.78 for the industry.

Earnings estimates for fiscal 2026 have declined 7% to $11.16 over the past 60 days, while those for fiscal 2027 have also decreased 7.5% to $11.41.

Qualcomm stock currently carries a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell).

news.Title: 台股今天很會漲 神山猛拉台達電衝進4兆天團｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:

🔭重大財經事件展望

台灣方面，國內焦點包括台灣機械工業公會會員大會、主計總處公布2月失業率，以及賦稅署記者會，市場將從中觀察內需、就業與產業景氣變化；企業動態則以法說會、除息與新股掛牌為主，法說會可留意 鴻海(2317) 、 京鼎(3413) 、 力旺(3529) 、 崇越電(3388) 與 中碳(1723) 等指標廠商，市場將關注AI伺服器、半導體設備、矽智財與上游材料需求展望，除息則可留意 聚陽(1477) 、 義隆(2458) 、 智易(3596) 、 東洋(4105) 與 矽力*-KY(6415) 等個股表現，此外 世紀風電(2072) 轉上市也可望成為盤面另一項觀察重點。

news.Title: 外資賣超121億元連4賣　重砍力積電逾8萬張居首
news.Content:

news.Title: 外資3月狂砍8166億 記憶體「失憶」大逃殺｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
隨著中東戰事出現降溫訊號，川普宣稱美伊已展開「具實質成果」的談話，並將對伊朗電力與能源設施的攻擊延後5天，帶動油價大跌、風險情緒回暖，四大指數走強。道瓊工業指數上漲1.38%，那斯達克指數上漲1.38%，標普500指數上漲1.15%，費城半導體指數上漲1.34%。個股表現方面，科技股率先反彈，Palantir大漲6.74%，特斯拉反彈3.5%，美超微回升5.11%，台積電ADR上漲2.80%，但美光逆勢下跌4.38%，反映市場對其擴產與資本支出升高的疑慮未消。

亞股表現同步回神，日股上漲1.43%，韓股走揚2.74%，港股強彈2.79%，上證指數上漲1.78%。

回到台股，今(24)日加權指數終場下跌110.26點，收在32,612.24點，成交金額6,656.06億元，盤中一度大漲逾600點後翻黑，呈現開高走低格局； 台積電(2330) 早盤一度衝上1,850元，但尾盤漲幅收斂，終場收平盤1,810元，成為權值撐盤主力； 鴻海(2317) 、 聯發科(2454) 收黑。整體盤面結構仍偏弱，記憶體股成為重災區，載板族群跌勢沉重，AI族群則是有零星個股表現抗跌，突顯資金雖守住指數，卻持續從電子題材族群撤出。

📝盤點熱門股：群創、力積電、主動統一台股增長

今日熱門成交股方面，前五檔全數收跌。 群創(3481) 以38.64萬張居冠，主因近期股價震盪明顯、連日躍居成交量王，今早又隨大盤由強翻弱，吸引短線買賣持續進出；記憶體股則由 力積電(6770) 與 華邦電(2344) 同步擠進前五，股價走弱，主要反映DRAM現貨價拉回、市場對記憶體「超級循環」是否提前見頂的疑慮升溫，加上美系外資下修相關個股評等與目標價，帶動賣壓出籠、成交放大。

至於ETF方面， 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 與 凱基台灣TOP50(009816) 表現同樣疲弱，不過在台股盤中一度大漲逾300點帶動下，ETF族群整體明顯出量，市值型與主動式產品皆吸引資金進出，交投維持熱絡。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超200.77億元，籌碼面偏空。其中外資賣超121.87億元，持續站在調節一方；自營商也賣超104.84億元，顯示內資操作同樣偏向保守。相較之下，投信買超25.94億元，成為三大法人中唯一偏多力量。整體來看，今天仍是外資、自營商聯手提款，投信獨撐買盤的格局。

✨本日議題股：BBU概念股

本日盤面聚焦BBU概念股，受惠AI伺服器對備援電力模組需求升溫，加上輝達GB200、GB300平台將BBU列為重要配置，相關族群再度獲資金點火；盤面上以 新盛力(4931) 表現最為強勢，早盤亮燈攻頂， 加百裕(3323) 、 順達(3211) 、 興能高(6558) 同步大漲， AES-KY(6781) 、 台達電(2308) 與 系統電(5309) 也聯袂走揚，顯示市場對電力架構題材仍高度買單。另一方面，BBU熱潮也帶旺周邊個股輪番表態...... 點我看更多

👥勞部抓慣老闆：

本日話題聚焦勞動部最低工資違規開罰，去年共有153件違規、開罰330萬元，其中以支援服務業最多，製造業、批發零售業與住宿餐飲業也都上榜。勞動部指出，最常見違規職業是保全人員，主因多與工時換算及薪資結構認定錯誤有關，後續...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周三國際財經事件，先看美國市場，焦點落在美國2月進出口價格與去年第四季經常帳，市場將藉此觀察貿易成本變化與外部收支情況；歐洲方面，英國將公布2月CPI、德國則發布3月Ifo企業信心指數，兩項數據都將牽動市場對歐洲景氣與貨幣政策走向的判斷；亞太區則聚焦日本央行公布上次會議記要、韓國3月消費者信心指數，以及澳洲2月CPI；港澳方面，港股進入財報揭露高峰，泡泡瑪特、安踏體育、快手將公布2025年第四季與全年業績，預料將成為市場關注重點。

台灣方面，國內焦點包括遠東商銀與台灣高檢署簽署MOU、高雄國稅局記者會、台經院發布3月景氣動向調查報告，以及台灣國際工具機展、台北國際自行車大展、台灣國際運動及健身展、亞太國際風力發電展等大型產業活動登場；企業動態則以股東會及法說會為主，股東會有 大眾控(3701) ，法說會可留意幾家指標大廠，包括 華南金(2880) 、 鈊象(3293) 、 東洋(4105) 、 91APP*-KY(6741) 、 美利達(9914) 、 巨大(9921) 與 裕融(9941) 等；此外， 神基(3005) 、 全國電(6281) 、 億豐(8464) 等除息， 有成精密(4949) 、 衛司特(6894) 同步除息，另 宏碁遊戲(6908) 轉上市、 民盛(7811) 轉上櫃，短線資金流向與股價反應也值得留意。

news.Title: 《台北股市》注意股：24日48檔 群聯、旺宏、上詮、波若威、燿華等
《數雲端》昕力資訊揪群聯等12家夥伴 AISO主權AI產業聯盟成軍
news.Content:
【時報記者張漢綺台北報導】昕力資訊(7781)舉行AISO主權AI產業聯盟簽署儀式，宣布攜手群聯電子(8299)，集結包含Gogolook、凱鈿、台灣銘板(6593)、大同世界科技、安圖斯、興創知能、景宜、智聯服務、精英電腦、豐康科技等12間國內知名軟硬體夥伴，與指導單位工研院共同展開策略合作，並與國泰金控(2882)與台達電子(2308)兩家重量級企業完成簽約。

昕力資訊表示，2026年被視為全球「主權AI元年」，AISO聯盟主打AI軟硬體整合式方案、整機交付的商業模式切入企業需求，降低企業在成本與維運上的門檻，推動主權AI方案更快進入規模化應用，並以拓展海外市場為方向，聯盟不只著眼於這塊市場遠景，而是打造一套「AISO Inside」的台灣標準，能確保100% 地端部署與物理隔離，完全符合歐盟AI法案與台灣資安規範。

昕力資訊董事長姚勝富指出，企業AI應用的關鍵瓶頸在於「企業端導入」，市場不缺AI技術，真正困難的是將AI能力對接到企業實際流程，同時兼顧資料治理與資安合規要求，為加速企業端應用落地，公司因此整合多家產業夥伴共同成立AISO聯盟，建立軟硬整合平台，以完整生態系，滿足金融、醫療、公部門等高價值產業之需求。

業界認為，AISO聯盟以平台、營運商、成員三方協作的模式，可解決企業導入AI最棘手的「最後一哩路」工程，一站式的服務，也能打破導入AI時的多頭馬車困境。

台達電資訊長曾立峰說明，群聯aiDAPTIV技術結合昕力軟體內建的一體機方案，讓企業在相同預算下，同時擁有高效能系統與 AI 應用軟體，可透過「AISO Inside」模式實現100%自主管理，加速落實 AI 智慧化轉型。

news.Title: 昕力資訊攜群聯等夥伴成立AISO主權AI產業聯盟 以整機交付加速企業導入
news.Content:
昕力資訊（7781）攜手群聯電子（8299）及多家軟硬體夥伴，成立AISO主權AI產業聯盟，鎖定企業導入AI最棘手的「最後一哩路」，主打軟硬整合、整機交付與交機即用模式，加速主權AI落地。

該聯盟提出「AISO Inside」架構，強調100％地端部署、資料不出境與物理隔離，鎖定金融、醫療與公部門等高監管產業需求。

國泰金控（2882）、台達電（2308）亦簽約加入，顯示主權AI已由技術驗證邁向實際商轉。法人看好，台廠可望憑藉ICT硬體優勢結合軟體整合能力，搶攻全球主權AI商機。

news.Title: 昕力資攜手群聯推AISO聯盟 已集結12家業者 今年可望見成果
news.Content:
興櫃資訊服務商昕力資訊（7781）攜手群聯電子（8299）今（23）日正式成立AISO主權AI產業聯盟，瞄準企業導入AI的兩大痛點。昕力資訊董事長姚勝富表示，聯盟將降低企業導入門檻與複雜度，現階段聯盟已有12家成員，預計今年內可望看到具體成果。

姚勝富指出，目前AI在企業端落地面臨兩大挑戰，一是硬體成本昂貴，二是軟體導入流程繁複，從安裝、整合到測試均需耗費大量時間與資源，「這些因素都讓AI難以真正進入百工百業」。AISO聯盟透過平台整合軟硬體資源，降低導入門檻並提升效率，使企業能以更低成本、更快速度完成部署。

在角色定位上，姚勝富表示，昕力資訊將同時扮演軟體供應商與平台營運者，負責制定技術規範、整合軟硬體夥伴資源，並依客戶需求媒合適合解決方案。現階段聯盟已有12家成員，未來也將持續擴大，邀請更多不同領域業者加入。

在市場布局方面，昕力資除深耕台灣外，也已拓展至東南亞與日本市場，包括越南、泰國、馬來西亞及菲律賓等地，未來將加速區域擴張，推動AI解決方案輸出海外。

群聯電子執行長潘健成表示，企業導入AI時最在意的並非單一硬體，而是能否直接使用的完整系統解決方案，「使用者要的是系統，不是硬體」。他指出，過去群聯在硬體領域具優勢，但在軟體整合與推廣上相對有限，透過與昕力合作，可強化整體解決方案能力。

潘健成進一步指出，目前全球企業普遍面臨AI導入困境，「知道要做AI，但不知道怎麼做，且成本過高」，導致實際落地案例有限。AISO聯盟目標在於建立可複製的成功模式，只要完成少數成功案例，便可快速複製至各產業，加速AI普及。

他強調，AI應用的關鍵在於整合能力，現實上沒有單一軟體公司能滿足企業所有需求，因此需透過平台整合不同專長業者，提供完整解決方案，讓企業從「無法導入」走向「可商業化運作」。

在硬體配置方面，聯盟採開放架構，透過伺服器整合多家供應商資源，依不同應用情境與算力需求進行客製化配置，提升彈性並降低成本。

姚勝富表示，目前已開始與企業客戶接洽，包括金融機構等指標客戶已進入測試階段，若測試順利將進一步擴大導入規模。整體而言，聯盟對後續發展持樂觀看法，並將持續擴大合作與投資，推動台灣AI產業由硬體導向轉向軟硬整合發展。

湯暖萱／財經特派記者，主跑主計處、營建、百貨紡織等

news.Title: 外資連環砍3月已破7千億 南亞科華邦電遭降評慘摔跌停｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
中東戰事與油價波動持續牽動市場神經，投資人同步消化戰事延長帶來的經濟壓力，美股四大指數多數收黑。不過，隨著以色列總理納坦雅胡釋出對伊朗戰事發展較樂觀的說法，油價自高檔回落，帶動尾盤跌幅收斂，費城半導體指數由黑翻紅。終場道瓊工業指數下跌0.44%，那斯達克指數下跌0.28%，標普500指數下跌0.27%，費城半導體指數上漲0.87%。科技股方面，輝達表現偏弱，市場對AI題材追價力道略見降溫；美光財報雖優於預期，但因資本支出擴大引發疑慮，股價下跌3.8%；特斯拉則因FSD調查擴大挫跌3.2%；台積電ADR則小跌0.2%。

亞股表現則偏弱分歧，日股因春分節休市；韓股小漲0.31%，港股下跌約0.88%，上證指數下跌1.24%。整體來看，市場仍在消化中東局勢、油價衝高後的影響，買盤相對保守。

回到台股，今（20）日加權指數開高走低，終場下跌145.80點，收在33543.88點，成交金額放大至9661億元，周線則逆勢收紅。權值股方面， 台積電(2330) 開高後翻黑，終場收1840元，小跌10元，仍是壓抑指數的關鍵；不過盤面並非全面轉弱， 聯發科(2454) 與 台達電(2308) 攜手小漲撐住電子股人氣。另一方面， 鴻海(2317) 小跌2元，陷入200元整數關卡保衛戰；而記憶體股受個股遭降評影響，族群賣壓沉重；而矽光子族群、鋼鐵族群獲買盤簇擁，表現逆風強勢。整體來看，台股仍在高檔震盪，呈現權值股偏弱、部分高價電子與題材股各自表態格局。

📝盤點熱門股：力積電、群創、華邦電

今日熱門成交股方面，記憶體族群是成交量重心。榜首由 力積電(6770) 拿下，單日成交量達52.62萬張。交投爆棚主因仍圍繞記憶體題材，盤中市場聚焦其搶攻HBM的轉型藍圖，帶動買賣積極進出。而 華邦電(2344) 、 南亞科(2408) ，兩檔雙雙跌停，受美系外資調降評等影響，加上記憶體股多檔近期陷入處置亂流，族群短線波動擴大，促使資金積極換手。

面板股則由 群創(3481) 居前，今日股價一度翻紅，但賣壓調節持續放大，終場收黑。另外， 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 今日小跌作收，但成交維持高檔。近期維持高人氣，受益人次也超過33萬人，在大盤震盪之際，仍吸引不少資金進場布局。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超488.13億元，籌碼面偏空，其中外資賣超399.85億元，續居調節主力，顯示在盤勢震盪之際，賣壓依舊沉重；自營商也提款101.05億元，反映內資操作同樣偏向保守。相較之下，投信則買超12.77億元，持續站在買方，成為三大法人中唯一偏多力量。整體來看，今天法人動向仍是外資、自營商聯手提款，投信獨撐買盤的格局。

✨本日議題股：鋼鐵概念股

鋼鐵概念股今日逆勢扮演盤面抗跌主角，主要受惠中東戰事推升油價、海運費與原物料成本，加上鋼廠接連調漲盤價，帶動市場預期鋼價正式脫離谷底。 中鋼(2002) 昨拍板4月月盤熱軋、冷軋每公噸調漲1200元，第二季季盤全面調升1000元； 中鴻(2014) 也同步調高4月內銷與5月外銷報價，內銷熱軋、冷軋與鍍鋅每公噸全面漲1200元，成為族群噴出的關鍵催化劑。盤面上...... 點我看更多

👥台積電「大掌櫃」退休：

本日話題聚焦台積電資深副總經理何麗梅將於4月退休的消息。何麗梅目前掌管企業策略發展組織及企業永續辦公室，將在服務27年後卸下職務；她長年被市場稱為台積電「大掌櫃」，也是張忠謀倚重的重要財務與策略幕僚，這次退休被外界視為台積電高層人事的重要變動。另一個引發熱議的焦點，則是她與家人持股市值已衝破121億元...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周一（3/23）國際財經展望，先看美國市場，當天暫無特別重大的關鍵經濟數據與超級財報事件，市場焦點仍可能圍繞聯準會政策訊號、美股科技股走勢與近期風險情緒變化；歐洲方面，當日同樣未見特別突出的核心數據；港澳方面，大陸將公布工業生產、失業率與固定資產投資等重磅數據，將成為當天亞洲市場最重要的觀察焦點，尤其工業生產可反映製造業與景氣回溫力道，失業率牽動內需信心，預料港股、中概股與原物料族群都將連動反應。

台灣方面，當天市場焦點將回到企業動態，股東會由 大大寬頻(7901) 率先登場，法說會則相對熱鬧，重點可留意 台泥(1101) 、 友通(2397) 、 可成(2474) 、 精測(6510) 、 安碁資訊(6690) 等指標公司釋出的營運展望與產業看法；此外， 鐿鈦(4163) 當天除息表現，以及 瑞宇(6842) 改名後的市場關注度，也可望成為盤面話題。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

news.Title: 記憶體類股盤中急挫，業界解讀為漲多修正、非產業翻轉
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】持續多日強勁的記憶體類股，今日卻意外成為市場殺盤重心，業界解讀，此狀況較漲多修正，而非產業翻轉。南亞科(2408)、威剛(3260)、宜鼎(5289)、華邦電(2344)、群聯(8299)、鈺創(5351)、晶豪科(3006)均重挫，凌航(3135)則逆勢漲停、旺宏(2337)黑翻紅。在AI趨勢下，國際三大記憶體製造商均將產能轉入高階的HBM與DDR5，致使一般性的DRAM與LPDDR雖然需求未上揚，但在供給短明顯縮減的情況下缺貨，並讓報價連翻漲。NAND的情況，也是在AI驅動下，現有供需出現變化，致使晶片端也轉為供給吃緊。

而記憶體製造商的南亞科與華邦電，以及模組廠的威剛等，還有群聯，近幾個月以來股價漲勢兇猛。今日台股在小黑小紅間震盪，但記憶體相關類股卻成為重災區，賣壓沈重。

業界解讀，主因是漲多修正，且有部分獲利了結賣壓湧出，而非產業翻轉，事實上，台股居高、國際市場動盪、經濟指數並非十分理想，加上國際戰爭等因素，漲多的主流焦點股，偶可見短線與中線震盪起伏。

然就DRAM產業趨勢來看，DRAM漲價效益會直接且明顯反應在製造端的財報上，而包括威剛、宜鼎等記憶體模組大廠，今年第一季賺贏去年全年也無虞。相關業者今年獲利表現都會來到一個歷史新高峰。

旺宏近期股價強漲，主因其為MLC NAND的供應商，此類產線為低階、技術水平不算高，且價格優勢不及主流產線，致使國際大廠均陸續退出，旺宏為市場僅存供應商，因時局變化而受益。無獨有偶的，今早有外資傳出MLC與傳統TLC NAND在下半年可能出現更嚴重缺貨，供給不足可能達約40%，遂降評南亞科、華邦電，調升旺宏，而業界則認為，MLC NAND接下來在售價上的漲勢，會對旺宏的獲利有幫助，但對今年全年與明年整體營運效益，以及旺宏繳出的獲利，是否能達到市場期待值，還需時間觀察。

news.Title: 外資倒貨909億大洩洪 台光電逆風衝進「兆元俱樂部」｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
聯準會主席鮑爾釋出通膨進展不如預期、短期沒有急著降息的偏鷹訊號，加上中東戰火推升油價、關稅與通膨疑慮再度升溫之下，美股四大指數全面收黑，道瓊工業指數下跌1.63%，那斯達克指數下跌1.46%，標普500指數下跌1.36%，費城半導體指數下跌0.53%。科技股漲跌互見，AMD因擴大與三星在AI基礎建設與記憶體晶片的策略合作，逆勢上漲1.6%，光通訊族群也相對有撐，但Visa、Mastercard等金融股受消費降溫疑慮拖累雙雙重挫逾3%，台積電ADR則下跌1.85%。

亞股同樣跟著承壓，主要市場普遍走低，日股下挫3.38%，韓股重跌2.73%，港股走弱2.05%，上證指數同樣下跌1.39%；反映市場持續消化鮑爾談話、油價走高壓力，盤面偏弱整理。

回到台股，今（19）日加權指數下跌658.90點，收在33689.68點，成交金額8477.02億元，失守34000點整數關卡；權值股方面， 台積電(2330) 重挫55元，成為壓抑大盤的關鍵，不過盤面並非全面潰散，中小型題材股仍持續活躍， 台光電(2383) 逆勢強攻190元、躋身台股第11檔兆元股；低軌衛星概念股 穩懋(3105) 亮燈創近4年新高，台塑四寶與部分光電、半導體設備股也有撐盤表現，顯示在外資大舉調節、權值股走弱之際，市場資金仍沿著題材與中小型電子股輪動，讓台股雖然重挫，盤面仍保有局部人氣。

另一方面，央行最新理監事會決議出爐，央行宣布利率按兵不動，已是連8凍，同時並對房市管制放寬，將自然人第2戶購屋貸款成數回升至6成，釋出略鬆綁訊號。

📝盤點熱門股：力積電、群創、主動統一台股增長

今日熱門成交股方面，記憶體股買賣最為火熱， 力積電(6770) 以50.98萬張居成交量榜首，股價走揚，在盤面震盪下仍吸引大量交投；華邦電(2344)則同步擠進前五名，不過股價小跌，延續記憶體族群震盪整理的走勢。面板股方面， 群創(3481) 成交量達36.45萬張，同樣成為成交人氣指標，雖然股價小跌，但在大盤重挫之際仍是市場資金反覆進出的焦點。

至於ETF包辦兩席， 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 、 凱基台灣TOP50(009816) 同步入榜，顯示在台股大跌、台積電重挫的盤勢下，成交榜呈現記憶體、面板與ETF三路資金同步活躍的格局。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超1020.22億元，賣壓明顯升溫，其中外資賣超909.47億元，成為盤面下殺的主要力量，不僅提款力道驚人，也創下史上第8高賣超紀錄；自營商同步賣超111.34億元，顯示在國際利空籠罩下，內資避險與調節動作也相當明顯。相較之下，投信則小幅買超0.59億元，持續站在買方。整體來看，今天法人籌碼呈現外資與自營商聯手大舉調節、投信獨撐買盤的格局，資金面明顯偏空。

✨本日議題股：PCB概念股

受AI伺服器、低軌衛星與高速傳輸需求帶動，PCB族群再度成為盤面吸金重心，其中 台光電(2383) 盤中飆上2895元改寫歷史天價，市值一舉突破1兆元，不僅穩坐PCB族群股王，也寫下台股PCB產業新里程碑；另一頭 金像電(2368) 同步發威，首度擠進千元俱樂部，市場人氣高燒不退。除此之外...... 點我看更多

👥股王「同花順」大戲：

股王信驊(5274)近日強勢改寫台股天價，18日收盤更是站上12345元「同花順」價位，不只再度鞏固股王地位，也讓市場把焦點從股價一路延伸到公司治理與高薪結構。曾歷經中年失業的董事長林鴻明，如今隨持股水漲船高，身價已攀上841億元；隨著股價飆升，信驊也同步催生5位身價破億元的主管與董事，凸顯高階經營團隊與公司成長紅利緊密連動。另一方面，信驊員工平均年薪稱霸上市櫃，高達...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周五國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，市場將關注加拿大2月零售額表現，以及FedEx即將公布的最新財報；歐洲方面，焦點落在俄羅斯央行公布最新利率決策，市場將評估其對通膨、匯率與區域金融市場的影響；亞太區方面，日本春分節休市，區域市場交投料相對清淡；港澳方面，留意中國3月貸款市場報價利率(LPR)出爐，作為觀察大陸貨幣政策與資金成本的重要風向球，此外港股方面，小鵬汽車與紫金礦業也將公布2025年全年財報，市場將聚焦資本支出規劃及後市展望。

news.Title: 股王「12345」收在同花順！台股破80檔漲停助大盤強漲｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
美國市場一面消化美伊戰事與荷姆茲海峽護航進度，另一面也緊盯高油價對通膨與利率路徑的干擾，四大指數在震盪下收漲。道瓊工業指數上漲0.10%，那斯達克指數上漲0.47%，標普500指數上漲0.25%，費城半導體指數上漲0.52%。科技股表現漲跌互見，美光受惠HBM4已為輝達新平台進入量產、股價大漲4.5%並改寫歷史收盤新高；輝達雖有GTC題材加持，股價反應相對溫和；台積電ADR則續揚1.69%。英特爾則因AI競爭力與獲利能力疑慮下挫3.72%。亞股今天則全面偏多，日股大漲2.87%，韓股強漲5.04%，港股上揚0.69%，上證指數小漲0.32%。

回到台股，今(18)日加權指數大漲512.01點，收在34,348.58點，成交金額8,983.83億元，盤中最高來到34,423.66點，最低33,929.28點，呈現開高走高、站穩3萬4的強勢格局。權值股方面， 台積電(2330) 收在1,905元，上漲35元、漲幅1.87%，持續扮演撐盤主軸；在GTC題材與AI買盤帶動下， 台達電(2308) 收漲1.74%， 廣達(2382) 漲1.38%， 日月光投控(3711) 漲逾5%，電子指數同步上揚1.84%。

此外，記憶體族群買氣延續；股王信驊(5274)盤中一度觸及12,450元再寫天價，收盤站上12,345元，也凸顯高價IC設計股與AI鏈人氣不墜。整體來看，今天台股不只靠權值股作戰，AI供應鏈、記憶體與高價電子股同步點火，上市、上櫃合計更有超過80檔漲停，顯示盤面多頭火力全面擴散。

📝盤點熱門股：群創、力積電、華邦電

記憶體股則包辦第二到第四名， 力積電(6770) 、 華邦電(2344) 與 旺宏(2337) 同步擠進成交前段班，其中華邦電走揚、旺宏更強勢漲停。族群買賣熱絡主因仍是記憶體題材升溫，市場一方面關注三星罷工風險可能使供給更趨緊俏，另一方面法人也看好DDR4、MLC NAND與NOR今年供需偏緊、漲價動能延續，帶動資金持續回流舊型記憶體概念股。

本日話題聚焦金管會政策鬆綁與制度檢討。金管會主委彭金隆在立法院備詢時，針對當沖降稅將於明年落日後是否再延長表示，仍須視政策成效、市場影響與整體評估後再決定，並未提前鬆口；另一個市場關注焦點則是零股制度改革，彭金隆也允諾檢討零股交易比整股晚10分鐘撮合、不能信用交易及當沖等限制...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周四國際財經事件，先看美國市場，焦點落在聯準會利率決策、會後記者會，以及上周初領失業救濟人數、1月新屋銷售、建築許可與CB領先指標，市場將從中觀察美國景氣韌性與後續降息路徑；歐洲方面，留意歐洲央行與英國央行公布最新利率決策；亞太區則聚焦日本央行利率決策、日本1月機械訂單與工業生產，以及澳洲2月就業報告，區域市場也將同步消化美光財報所釋出的半導體景氣訊號；港澳方面，華為中國合作夥伴大會於深圳登場並延續至20日，在AI、通訊設備與供應鏈題材帶動下，相關動向料將牽動陸港科技股表現。
